body:

| | Update for you -- after classified briefings on the upcoming health crisis, Georgia Sen. David Perdue and other Republican senators used that inside information and unloaded stocks before their portfolios tanked in the economic fallout. Do you know what else Senator Perdue has invested in? His PAC gave our opponent Bill Hagerty $10,000 to fuel his campaign. Enough is enough. Too many of our leaders in Washington are in the pocket of corporate PACs and special-interest groups, and Hagerty promises more of the same. [_**We want to hear what you think: Do you think Hagerty should give Sen. Perdue 's money to charity?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa15d/18d6a294/4cb15d27/26d6121c/702833637/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200407p") | | | [GIVE IT TO CHARITY](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa15d/18d6a294/4cb15d27/26d6121c/702833637/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200407p")

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Domestic violence and COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Content warning: domestic violence

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038e/7f51f7bc/4c91f602/4ef135fe/2604750775/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | One of my first memories was my mother being thrown through a plate glass door. For some families out there, being stuck inside as a result of COVID-19 means being stuck inside with a domestic abuser.

**[That's why I'm asking you to donate to support the National Domestic Violence Hotline today if you can.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038e/7f51f7bc/4c91f602/4ef135fd/2604750775/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-domesticviolence?refcode=email_20200407.3nd__1183__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

COVID-19 has put an unprecedented strain on our shelters, which need our help in the best of times. Reports of domestic abuse have spiked, and victims are facing a shortage of resources. They need our help. **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038e/7f51f7bc/4c91f602/4ef135fd/2604750775/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-domesticviolence?refcode=email_20200407.3nd__1183__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Can I count on you to step up if you can and help your neighbors get the life-saving resources they need in this crisis?

\-- MJ

If you or someone you know is struggling with domestic violence, you can contact the National Domestic Violence Hotline by calling 1-800-799-7233 or by texting "LOVEIS" to 22522.

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038e/7f51f7bc/4c91f602/4ef135fd/2604750775/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-domesticviolence?refcode=email_20200407.3nd__1183__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038e/7f51f7bc/4c91f602/4ef135fc/2604750775/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1183&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038e/7f51f7bc/4c91f602/4ef135f3/2604750775/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

It's true -- the makeup of the United States Senate depends on the outcome of Maine's election in November. Susan's opponent and her out of state allies on the Far Left know this, and they have spent millions of dollars to try to win this race. And they do not plan on slowing down anytime soon...

Susan's opponent and her out-of-state allies on the Far Left know this, and they have spent millions of dollars to try to win this race. And they do not plan on slowing down anytime soon...
**Their plan is simple:** _First,_ they are gathering tens of millions of dollars from dark money donors from New York City to Hollywood. _Then,_ they are using that money to falsely attack Susan's character and record -- spreading lies about her throughout Maine.
Peter, Susan needs us right now. **We cannot let them continue spreading lies.**
We're asking you to help put a stop to this by making a contribution of anything you can afford today. We need Susan back in the Senate to put Maine and our country FIRST. You can help make that happen.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Local Help for Local Businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Please join me by video or phone call on Thursday, April 9th at 3 p.m. for our first Greater Houston Area Restaurant and Small Business Forum. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/827dbe63e8fb/trump-announces-national-emergency-for-covid-631077?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | **Hi ** friend,
**It is my privilege to share an initiative that I hope uplifts and directly benefits you.**
**Please join me by video or phone call on Thursday, April 9th at 3 p.m. for our first Greater Houston Area Restaurant and Small Business Forum. I am thrilled to team with RestaurantOwner.com and a panel of local business owners to offer support, encouragement, and resources to the businesses we all know and love.** [**REGISTER NOW**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=630c74e96f&e=01c99b7fbd) **In my 30 years in the commercial cattle industry and technology sector I have navigated everything from rural area family business, to international manufacturing. My husband, Holloway (Holly), spent nearly 40 years growing a one-man business he founded to eventual large corporate sale. I know what it feels like to live and breathe small business, and I know what it takes to make a business thrive.** **I am personally committed to helping our small businesses succeed as our nation heals from the coronavirus pandemic and our community re-opens. Forum details are below – please join me for this event, share with any you know who may benefit, and write to[Info@KathaleenWall.com](mailto:Info@KathatleenWall.com) to let me know what I can do to answer your questions and concerns during this time.** [**REGISTER NOW**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=2e23a49076&e=01c99b7fbd) **Sincerely,** **Kathaleen Wall** **Visit KathaleenWall.com for a list of federal, state, and local healthcare resources for your convenience. The spirit of America is unbreakable and we will live through this difficult time together!**
---
|
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487
[Add us to your address book](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877)
You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=4a9aa8a839).
---

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Invites You To #CheckInTN
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-ji/)
# April 7, 2020
## **Stay Connected with #CheckInTN**
To help ease the burden of isolation during this difficult time of social distancing and physical separation, #TeamHagerty launched #CheckInTN, a social media campaign aimed at connecting Tennesseans with loved ones who cannot be together at this time. To participate in #CheckInTN, create a list of five friends, family members and neighbors to check-in with to help those suffering from the feelings of loneliness and anxiety during the coronavirus outbreak.
Click **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-r/) **for a list of resources to help your community. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-j/)** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-t/) **ICYMI: Listen to Bill on WVNN**Last week, Bill joined WVNN's Jeff Poor to talk about COVID-19 and the impact it is having across Tennessee and the United States. Listen as Bill talks about China's attempt to cover up valuable data related to the coronavirus. The Communist leadership in China committed the "crime of the century" and must be held accountable for their mismanagement of this health crisis. To read more about how Bill plans to support President Trump in his efforts to push back against Communist China, read his recent editorial in Breitbart **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-i/)**
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-d/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-h/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[AP:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Hagerty raises $1.2M more in Tennessee bid for US Senate**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-m/) **Hagerty Calls China's Handling of Coronavirus 'Crime of the Century'**[The Epoch Times:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Beijing's Coverup of CCP Virus 'Crime of the Century,' Says Former US Ambassador to Japan**[Hagerty on The Brent Carl Fleshman Morning Show](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-q/)****[Hagerty on The Dan Mandis Show 99.7](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-a/)****[Hagerty on WNWS](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-f/)**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-e/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkukic-fuutjhhtj-yu/)

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends- This has been a stressful time for our community. I want to thank everyone who is an essential worker and those who are helping in their own way. Over the last week, our team has delivered supplies to nursing homes, food to hospital workers and first responders, and hosted informative tele-town halls with seniors, local residents, and the small business community. We will continue to do all that we can to help our community.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2250)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

This has been a stressful time for our community.

I want to thank everyone who is an essential worker and those who are helping in their own way. Over the last week, our team has delivered supplies to nursing homes, food to hospital workers and first responders, and hosted informative tele-town halls with seniors, local residents, and the small business community. We will continue to do all that we can to help our community.

But, I wanted to take a moment to check in with you and provide information related to COVID-19 that you might find helpful.

The recent CARES Act has expanded coverage to more workers who are not traditionally eligible for unemployment, such as self-employed, contractors, furloughed workers and more. [For more information on who’s covered and updates to the unemployment insurance visit our CARES ACT EXPLAINED page:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2251)

---
| | |
---
| | [ THE CARES ACT EXPLAINED ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2251)
---
| | |
---
| | If you’re a small business owner, the CARES Act is providing additional assistance through the U.S. Small Business Administration. This includes an expansion of the Small Business Economic Injury Disaster Loans & Emergency Economic Injury Grants, and creation of the Paycheck Protection Program. [Visit our CARES ACT EXPLAINED page for more information on relief for small businesses:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2251)

---
| | |
---
| | [ SUPPORT FOR IMPACTED BUSINESSES ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2251)
---
| | |
---
| | On Monday, I held a small business telephone townhall with Senator Marco Rubio, Chairman of the Senate Committee on Small Business, to discuss the CARES Act and answer a few of your questions. [Watch the Small Business Townhall now:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2252)

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2252)
---
| | |
---
| | [ WATCH NOW ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2252)
---
| | |
---
| | For information on [precautions to take at home particularly when you or someone in your household is sick:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2253)

---
| | |
---
| | [ PRECAUTIONS AT HOME ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2253)
---
| | |
---
| | For more information on [how to care for and protect your pets:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2254)

---
| | |
---
| | [ COVID-19 AND PETS ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2254)
---
| | |
---
| | Remember social distancing doesn’t have to mean social isolation. Don’t forget to call your neighbors, friends, family or even send them an email.

If you need help coping, contact the NYS Emotional Support Helpline at 844-863-9314.

Be safe and stay strong, we’ll get through this together.

---
| |
---
| | Assemblywoman Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |
---
| | | | We have created a COVID-19 Information Center to bring you the latest news.

---
| | | [ VISIT PAGE ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=137A184A1A2255)

name: Claire Chase
subject: Claire Chase Brings Dinner to Law Enforcement; Opposes Governor's Decision to Release Convicts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OTydN-FsdD7TThEm9woMwuKb6rySaowAyB08xzO5692ESTqF2hclgWsWAmWBP7ed9LRe3t7NQ5jVhZToSL66IDB0FffiU3BbLrR7hLFUayfziGl2BXIzgMT6YV1VqjhLKNhx6VuvJMVjs9q-ZWG1nw==&c=GVbNodvaPMxC_cKRWhVyuCAZLUL8tyBmRsZwRRrzeYuVH06aVg-Nog==&ch=S10x_PKqVIlpogpoaL8_BWGgS9kdNkYbw54HWCNHDN9KB6DVoOGtrA==)
---
| Peter - We dropped off dinner for Sheriff Mark Cage and the heroes in the Eddy County Sheriff's Office last night! A common theme I've heard from law enforcement officers is that they've seen a spike in crime during the coronavirus pandemic. It really makes me question Governor Grisham's decision to release a bunch of convicts from prison.
---
|
---
| BACKGROUND:
This week New Mexico Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham [announced](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OTydN-FsdD7TThEm9woMwuKb6rySaowAyB08xzO5692ESTqF2hclgXi2f7vbY55aWy8qRMYaxvAGK7uBiPgRKwqwkkdkfJ0-Bvb7xCJEAqS39eGam1UJJtzKmsZiietV184PvstVCCl0t3qvCbjQWAP-p2WeAnf7WYDfDV_-FbP051snXXC5I2mFfFIQ4tgQLd1Bh2KgSrEEGJ14C2QjZvZECT80SdyNyqex3KpVuRJnwxw-Z_At-Q==&c=GVbNodvaPMxC_cKRWhVyuCAZLUL8tyBmRsZwRRrzeYuVH06aVg-Nog==&ch=S10x_PKqVIlpogpoaL8_BWGgS9kdNkYbw54HWCNHDN9KB6DVoOGtrA==) she was commuting prison sentences for a number of convicted criminals.
Grisham's decision to release these convicts comes after she deemed [gun stores](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OTydN-FsdD7TThEm9woMwuKb6rySaowAyB08xzO5692ESTqF2hclgXi2f7vbY55aNxhmzvb16tgv1RL7aGPvG-fK1ZI4-uA9wc8iLgiYT6p3Hj3a9rvAjE3T64y1vFkgDbHC0TlvbfBMO4FBugu72-dHXV5IkYnRNKQbowCQm1GEN0RCwlV8RjqOkMLBWyoPYF7-zrcZfWvKhQFQDEnXuZK-yLNrbfJwcijDp_FJc7QbLEx31j3mJFk447WGBTq7zFvfAENh6YMjr_DJv_afcerjjhR51AymMymbcN5Tsh7CzhzpjnOQbzjC8Z1KYAxz3iSv1Yyr6nJJ-gRQI54g1w==&c=GVbNodvaPMxC_cKRWhVyuCAZLUL8tyBmRsZwRRrzeYuVH06aVg-Nog==&ch=S10x_PKqVIlpogpoaL8_BWGgS9kdNkYbw54HWCNHDN9KB6DVoOGtrA==) non-essential, forced them to close, and rendered New Mexicans unable to defend themselves.

---
| God Bless,
---
|
---

name: Team Eugene
subject: Our April newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
March was a big month on our campaign, and we also had to make some adjustments to keep our staff and our community safe as the COVID-19 pandemic began. We wanted to share some of our important updates, information, and some of the ways our team is transitioning to a completely digital operation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030833/181526725/1960319551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) Team,

March was a big month on our campaign, and we also had to make some adjustments to keep our staff and our community safe as the COVID-19 pandemic began. We wanted to share some of our important updates, information, and some of the ways our team is transitioning to a completely digital operation.

But first, our team is hosting a webinar tonight at 8 PM to discuss ways we can all help our community during the outbreak of COVID-19. If you’d like to learn about tangible ways you can offer support to your neighbors, [**please sign up here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030834/181526726/-1274271881?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249).

_**Team Eugene Out and About**_

Before we moved our campaign fully online, Eugene was as busy as ever getting out and meeting people, including [**attending Dominican Independence Day in York**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030835/181526727/-1696775368?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249). Eugene also participated in a Players Using Competition Helping Others Grow (PUCHOG) sledge hockey practice. PUCHOG is a local nonprofit that provides wounded veterans an opportunity to stay active and gather with fellow veterans with shared experiences. And Eugene was so grateful to receive [**the recommendation of Carlisle Area Democratic Committee ahead of his primary election**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030836/181526728/-1783970873?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249).

Eugene also had the opportunity to record an episode of the [**Battleground PA podcast**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030837/181526729/931951235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) where he discussed his plans to expand access to health care, lower the cost of prescription drugs, combat climate change, reform our criminal justice system, and fight for economic fairness. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030838/181526730/1726898098?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)
_**Team Eugene Online**_

Our team has been [**heeding the advice of the CDC**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030839/181526731/-1368851855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) and working remotely since the middle of March. This means we’re getting creative about how to best reach voters across South Central PA and run a digital campaign. Eugene participated in a virtual Citizens Climate Lobby Town Hall to discuss how climate change is already impacting our lives and how we must act now to minimize the effects on our communities and our economy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030840/181526732/1726898098?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)
_**Team Eugene Community Efforts**_

We know that so many in our community have been impacted by the COVID-19 outbreak, so our team has been busy trying to help in any way we can: **→** We created a **[collaborative list of resources](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17030841/181526733/-860276674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllZWJkOS1iYTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z04F8wrKTJWr8jfU4EF5KRMowKV38zkd0byyWebHhus=&emci=9014366c-a679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fe9eebd9-ba79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)** and mutual aid in York, Cumberland, & Dauphin → We started creating care packages for people in need → We began conducting daily and weekly check-ins with our older and at-risk volunteers If you’d like to find ways you can help, please join the [**South Central PA COVID-19 Response We wanted to share some of our important updates, information, and some of the ways our team is transitioning to a completely digital operation. Team, March was a big month on our campaign, and we also had to make some adjustments to keep our staff and our community safe as the COVID-19 pandemic began. We wanted to share some of our important updates, information, and some of the ways our team is transitioning to a completely digital operation. But first, our team is hosting a webinar tonight at 8 PM to discuss ways we can all help our community during the outbreak of COVID-19. If you’d like to learn about tangible ways you can offer support to your neighbors, . Team Eugene Out and About Before we moved our campaign fully online, Eugene was as busy as ever getting out and meeting people, including . Eugene also participated in a Players Using Competition Helping Others Grow (PUCHOG) sledge hockey practice. PUCHOG is a local nonprofit that provides wounded veterans an opportunity to stay active and gather with fellow veterans with shared experiences. And Eugene was so grateful to receive . Eugene also had the opportunity to record an episode of the where he discussed his plans to expand access to health care, lower the cost of prescription drugs, combat climate change, reform our criminal justice system, and fight for economic fairness. Team Eugene Online Our team has been and working remotely since the middle of March. This means we’re getting creative about how to best reach voters across South Central PA and run a digital campaign. Eugene participated in a virtual Citizens Climate Lobby Town Hall to discuss how climate change is already impacting our lives and how we must act now to minimize the effects on our communities and our economy. name: Betsy Rader
subject: This hasn't changed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| |
---
**Essential.** ** ** Educators have _always_ been essential. Nurses have _always_ been essential. Grocery store workers have _always_ been essential. Farmers have _always_ been essential. Truck drivers have _always_ been essential. **In this unprecedented time of crisis, we can clearly see how essential each person in our community is.** It's also the time to act, while the nation's focus is on our essential workers. Every person, no matter their party affiliation, sees the need for these jobs to make our economy work. _We must elect people who have demonstrated their commitment to the dignity of work._ [__](https://act.myngp.com/el/NySOipMcsD9SLaW2koArkjbjzOQcCyH_tQ2vRsyZWV8=/5HSn5LGx_dgDls6T_HKW7M23okdrC730CTkbgp17QXs=?refcode=essentialA&amount=15) As an employment lawyer, Betsy fights for the rights of workers and most recently has been fielding calls from essential workers who are concerned about their safety in the workplace, sick pay, and their healthcare coverage during this pandemic. Unions like the Ohio Education Association, the Ohio Federation of Teachers, the Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen, the Laborers Union Local 894, and more have endorsed Betsy because they know that she will stand up for working families in Ohio. _Working families know she has always seen them as essential, and will take that track record to the State Senate._ **We know times are tough, but if you are able to chip in $15 dollars today, it will go a long way to making sure this campaign keeps our momentum all the way to the ballot box in November.** [****](https://act.myngp.com/el/NySOipMcsD9SLaW2koArkjbjzOQcCyH_tQ2vRsyZWV8=/5HSn5LGx_dgDls6T_HKW7M23okdrC730CTkbgp17QXs=?refcode=essentialA&amount=15) | ______________________________ _**Thank you for your**_ _**endorsement!**_ ______________________________ _****_ _Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen _ _Laborers Local Union No. 894_ _Bakery, Confectionery, Tobacco Workers and Grain Millers International Union Local 19 _

We have to keep moving forward.

Last month we made it through the primary, Friend, but the fight doesn't stop there. Despite unforeseeable challenges, we managed to overcome and outperform everyone's expectations -- _we even WON the primary as the #1 vote-getter against our incumbent opponent!_

But we have to keep moving forward.

[**WE NEED 1,000 GRASSROOTS SUPPORTERS TO CHIP IN WHATEVER THEY CAN BY MIDNIGHT TONIGHT TO KEEP OUR MOMENTUM BUILDING

**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XaCRdE4BwhkAlfJYC59R7_12D8UtIsVB9UkKlisdtvELas6M1RCOQq4_f3CtmFU175T358cB_bB6uQJAeTau7UBe94Si_dZBEQj0jpna64J7RcutgzYbbShZlkB1B-tDjJ2VvAwAeamEmQ3pOGK6wmY9bRhFkXsPIdAiMpRMXN96Zq525LIQ1MNSiCzdqFccGXyNDG5nXzLMOAFK2iNLxOC-QnsXnstk7OZfkxkSvigOQUGMGj2AKbZnEj1JC3eRaoup_x5h8zOUljna0Ha-QSRSBGIp-sj2XBfWqPXm67xQe6Xtm-ryntfMmD_esyydt4SqiFD-_f1gGsu3YLXZNJNszFnsCr6VDaOsHdx_z9diqydHWhae6A==&c=whPYhFskkk2O-ntfbJ8ZF34Fh2bUp6I36sdPapPtz2ewPL5P8BurMA==&ch=F8Q9GyaCNOjVWTVInK0jodZYqVDVe8UcadaIfphVNCRdLNx7XQqJHA==) POLITICO ranked this race as an absolute tossup, and one vote may be the difference between victory and defeat. Even worse, after our performance in the Primary, we've become a major target. That's why we've set this ambitious goal and why we're coming to you for help.

[**Can we count on you to step up and join us? Your donation could be the one to push us across the finish line. If you are able, don 't forget to chip in by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XaCRdE4BwhkAlfJYC59R7_12D8UtIsVB9UkKlisdtvELas6M1RCOQq4_f3CtmFU175T358cB_bB6uQJAeTau7UBe94Si_dZBEQj0jpna64J7RcutgzYbbShZlkB1B-tDjJ2VvAwAeamEmQ3pOGK6wmY9bRhFkXsPIdAiMpRMXN96Zq525LIQ1MNSiCzdqFccGXyNDG5nXzLMOAFK2iNLxOC-QnsXnstk7OZfkxkSvigOQUGMGj2AKbZnEj1JC3eRaoup_x5h8zOUljna0Ha-QSRSBGIp-sj2XBfWqPXm67xQe6Xtm-ryntfMmD_esyydt4SqiFD-_f1gGsu3YLXZNJNszFnsCr6VDaOsHdx_z9diqydHWhae6A==&c=whPYhFskkk2O-ntfbJ8ZF34Fh2bUp6I36sdPapPtz2ewPL5P8BurMA==&ch=F8Q9GyaCNOjVWTVInK0jodZYqVDVe8UcadaIfphVNCRdLNx7XQqJHA==)

But we have to keep moving forward. == POLITICO ranked this race as an absolute tossup, and one vote may be the difference between victory and defeat. Even worse, after our performance in the Primary, we've become a major target. Peter, **This crisis has shown us that we need leadership we can trust. ** Unfortunately, we have seen the opposite from our current representatives. On the first day doctors confirmed the coronavirus had made its way to the United States, South Korea also confirmed their first case — there was a big difference in how we handled it. South Korea took this threat very seriously. They mobilized, implemented massive testing, but most importantly, they did not downplay the virus. Here in the US, our president brushed off the virus as nothing more than the flu in order to “save” the economy and stave off an electoral threat. His inaction condemned thousands of Americans to death. And Trump wasn’t alone. **As ranking member of Foreign Affairs, Michael McCaul would have seen medical intelligence about the vast threat as early as November — and did nothing. Then early this year, one of Trump’s top advisors, Peter Navarro, explicitly warned of "an increasing probability of a full-blown COVID-19 pandemic that could infect as many as 100 million Americans, with a loss of life of as many as 1-2 million souls."** Instead of protecting constituents, McCaul followed Trump’s playbook of ignore, deny and deflect. When he knew he could no longer downplay the pandemic, McCaul found someone else to blame — China. McCaul’s dangerous rhetoric gave Texans a false sense of security, allowing the virus to spread freely, and stoked the flames of Asian-American bigotry in our country. [**We need leadership in Washington that will fight for what is right regardless of what benefits them. That is why I am running for Congress. Let’s send McCaul to an early retirement and restore real representation back to the Texas 10th. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17031845/181538503/203122784?refcode=em040820&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjU3N2U5Zi1iZTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Re71iY089U1EXUvPD0puwxTM9eHGgs70mlqAqbehT-k=) Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

name: Charles Booker
subject: Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Make no mistake: our fight for Medicare for All, decent wages for every worker, a Green New Deal, and an economy that works for all of us is nowhere close to over.
#
News just dropped that Bernie Sanders has suspended his presidential campaign.
I know there’s a lot of distraught folks out there who are wondering what this means for our progressive movement and the issues we’ve been working so fiercely for this election.
I’m not going to lie, this announcement saddens me as well. **But make no mistake: our fight for Medicare for All, racial justice, a Green New Deal, and an economy that works for all of us is _nowhere close to over. _**
The country is now looking at progressive campaigns like ours and waiting to see what we do now after Bernie’s announcement.
**[Will you chip in $5 to stand with our progressive movement? Let’s send a strong message that we believe that flipping the Senate, defeating Mitch, and fighting for real change is more important than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17032290/181543848/-561295408?refcode=em20200408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMwYzg2MS1jMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ldcnJc4ndpz8HJpIP3TfOd8yo0MBplPTx5vAAPElxx0=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17032291/181543849/-561295408?refcode=em20200408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMwYzg2MS1jMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ldcnJc4ndpz8HJpIP3TfOd8yo0MBplPTx5vAAPElxx0=)****
I endorsed Bernie Sanders because I believe the paths to beating Donald Trump and unseating Mitch McConnell are the same.
We need a strong progressive agenda that will inspire and excite millions of new voters to turn out for the first time. And we need a grassroots movement that will channel the energy of working people desperate for change.
The sad truth is that Bernie Sanders had a real shot at winning the Democratic nomination.
But somewhere along the way, fear grew that the progressive change he was fighting for was too ambitious or too lofty. We can’t let that same fear freeze us from ever making progress.
****It’s that exact fear that’s keeping Mitch McConnell in power and preventing us from building a movement powerful enough to flip Kentucky. Until now.****
**I refuse to make that mistake.** My promise to you is that our campaign will be fighting harder than ever for the change working-class people have been waiting for too long for.
**[If you want to support this fight, please chip in $5 or anything you can to our people-powered campaign today. We need to build a grassroots army to defeat the corporate money that has controlled our politics.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17032305/181543863/-561295408?refcode=em20200408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMwYzg2MS1jMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ldcnJc4ndpz8HJpIP3TfOd8yo0MBplPTx5vAAPElxx0=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17032306/181543864/-561295408?refcode=em20200408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMwYzg2MS1jMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ldcnJc4ndpz8HJpIP3TfOd8yo0MBplPTx5vAAPElxx0=)****
Together,
Charles

| Friends, Thank you to everyone that tuned into my Power of Prayer event last night! Hundreds of Granite Staters gathered together (from their living rooms) to pray with us as a community. It was truly overwhelming and humbling!
Many of you have reached out and asked me to share my prayer. Below you can find a copy.
Once again, thank you all for praying with me last night. If we keep God in our lives, we will get through this together. Stay safe, stay healthy and thank you. \- Matt
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Lord, we come to you with open but fearful hearts. These are tumultuous times but we know you are with us. You are in command and we must trust. We open our arms and ask for your embrace Open our eyes so we may see your path As the sun warms our bodies let your love warm our souls We ask for forgiveness for YOU know what we have done and need to do We hold up our nurses and doctors, please guide their hands We hold up our first responders and praise them for their dedication We hold up those who are ill and ask you to heal their wounds We hold up those who are afraid, comfort them Lord We hold up those who are anxious, please bring them peace We ask for patience Lord We ask to stand on your strong foundation and together we will build anew Lord, you know our strengths, you know our worries. Fill the space in between with your love and wisdom. Be the hand on our shoulder reminding us to be strong. Lord, you see our actions and you know our hearts; help us to be good stewards of your love and graciousness The sun rises on your command. The grass grows at your mere whisper. Lord, you are everything we need and everything we could want. I ask you to bless the friends on this call and bless who could not be with us. Help us grow closer to you Lord not just through the trying times but the times of celebration. You have shown us a path forward and together we will travel with you. I ask these things in your Holy name. Amen Matt Mayberry April 7, 2020
---

Friend,
President Trump and Senate Republicans want to hear from you! Your opinions and concerns are crucial to helping Republicans in battleground states this year - knowing what's on the minds of grassroots supporters directly impacts our ability to aid Senate Republicans in these races.

As of [[**04/08/2020**]](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkEfi2aC8bpPrBRzrkx4Qe9xojUtWZ9Z65qZZXNrBui660DDyw4bXWok3VcXO9sTjYUZnqfIuyXOREuXOEZ4g7FSo8FHx69U0nCBXT9iQx2yQgkXuIGep8tulHObwaZnd9WpoJroJaFv5CDnU7ayCVg2mEnhkQ2Vbier1eKsYyn-n3X4yfRuYP6quV0c7An1uukWvbrg92L8_fakfaaurBbPV0h4PaGe9PsbXP5kegYIUYQ-A1EVPZJJYDQQZsMYyVb_OsNPx-bpd3D2JqXcfrgY6V-ot3jlUJjVjJZnUEh1ivJPz8vGdCytcwxyj-eIgEeD32bvKBBkQk9_iwHwSNcX-aQwcOQPRARNU3XockKlLGFf-daObZB4q81UtnJo4PpVPyaIElA=&c=xKpHys5eHw24CkxW64kXsaBQ6CMLDrSCdLYKLNgQoEEkPQNW4wddzg==&ch=A8_SxYPViaHG5gXQvh8VocQW76iwxwcglpfW7-xrTSJjrds0S9qi9w==), our records indicate that we have yet to receive your responses.

Senate Republicans like Todd Young are counting on you to record your responses, and let them know how to represent you better because ultimately, your feedback will go directly to informing the Republican Leadership and President Trump, as we head into the 2020 election cycle.

**Plain Dealer: How John Kasich Helped Position Ohio for the Coronavirus Crisis**

_"In the face of the coronavirus pandemic, Ohio is much better positioned than otherwise thanks to former Gov. John Kasich, a suburban Columbus Republican..."_

_"Example: But for Kasich’s stewardship, Ohio wouldn’t have a $2.7 billion rainy day fund to help balance Ohio’s budget amid the damage the pandemic’s doing to Ohio’s economy. Yet in 2018, his critics, from both parties, demanded that he spend that money. Kasich said no."_

name: Georgia Senate Alert
subject: Kelly Loeffler
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, _The_ _Washington Post_ says winning in Georgia is the KEY to Democrats taking back the Senate - so this is alarming news:
| | | | Our Republican opponent - Kelly Loeffler - is _flooding_ the race with $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | _POLITICO_ says Mitch McConnell is lining up "the full backing of the Republican establishment" to support her. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Worst of all: News just broke that she knew critical information about the coronavirus threat and instead of telling the public, dropped MILLIONS in stock before the crisis took hold. |
---|---|---|---
**With an opponent like this, failure is simply not an option.**
**_That's why we need your urgent support, friend_.** Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN win in Georgia and take back the Senate - but if we lose here, we'll hand Senate control back to McConnell.
**[Friend: If you're ready to take back the Senate, will you give $5 or more now so we can defeat McConnell's chosen candidate and flip this seat blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk151-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
At times like these, we need moral leadership in the Senate - leaders who will fight for the people, not just their personal bottom line. Our Republican opponent has spent so much time in corporate board rooms and Washington back rooms that she can no longer be trusted to do what's right.
**Winning this race is critical, but it won't be easy. For us to defeat our GOP opponent, flip Georgia blue and end McConnell's reign in the Senate, we need immediate grassroots support. But r****ight now, we're falling $11,356 short of our crucial goal - and time is running out before the midnight deadline. The _only_ way we'll close this gap is if every single grassroots supporter pitches in right now. [Friend: If you want to take back the Senate, will you give $5 or more so we can defeat Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate and flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk151-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

body:
There are less than 7 months until election day in November. So far, the fight that we have put up against the millions of dark money dollars funneling into Maine has been astounding. But in order for Susan to win in November, we MUST do better.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGhvoEts1AfRvmmRfQ4LrFBK-KtmcSv23tqw1cPhK1Mwc9tAkw0opMzhbWTowi6CW2XW_qrT-WLCznOL9zdEEkwWtcAgIXjrhWIZVHL-mrr5lsGsVVhCUTYBYBPUQ4QVjLBNcxKig1FNuyF6zgixAooBKMUtAE3ldnMIJW4mbG-otO7suhJyF1VffonYlWG6UIg4LiyaD3_YiLxtVtMVY0S35bYVudEoi1gWw1kekdAxEJ7IpysUJCBnrNJTavB91S8Yi3YS_bDUJLxMqfmyrW2u3L9BIZ5nFBhdB1jS8M3PcpiIRw-6toZx9Y0KVWxoavc6PHSY6Xn21DBYT8COSj47UXHE0QNa&c=m0KEx53ZmpWk0xjz99JzRgEnoUUxs3VVKpaGouzEHsIDGDXIT3dnwA==&ch=8sNfby1fvr0pDa2Eu305Qa_a48c_8d9TkmJnzfr9lEaxb8YMzBlHUg==)[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGhvoEts1AfRvmmRfQ4LrFBK-KtmcSv23tqw1cPhK1Mwc9tAkw0opHgcWdA2fH_ETBh4tdy_2xEcUJN28I1AP9RfTM10HciQsO7N7RRR5tCHepbapuMAheEWqwyEhWfNyNCVYBRHr3wNrYqgxwddFAVWENueIaT3CKLUUCJp0SvabskPIZph2E2avoPUrnEEkC7OJUM3iuoT-JOtDbOu8n9FoJvezLRulsBKnhPMjP61pBQS5O4lNxNWOo0bxKmLcwrjrjpeygqrtRaExqOSvYu9GaPR-7a5LnP6Uu5g0_7NmlHljxk20MF9XOMbLS49CFDPTyyLLkY7Y9CS0b9DZmLEti21GQC9&c=m0KEx53ZmpWk0xjz99JzRgEnoUUxs3VVKpaGouzEHsIDGDXIT3dnwA==&ch=8sNfby1fvr0pDa2Eu305Qa_a48c_8d9TkmJnzfr9lEaxb8YMzBlHUg==)
[important memo for $SUBSCRIBER.EMAIL from Susan Collins for Senator campaign staff]
**There are less than 7 months until election day in November.** So far, the fight that we have put up against the millions of dark money dollars funneling into Maine has been astounding. But in order for Susan to win in November, **we MUST do better.**
That is why all of us here at Team Collins are proposing this question to Susan's most loyal supporters: [**Could you contribute once a month until November and become a sustaining donor of Susan 's campaign?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGhvoEts1AfRvmmRfQ4LrFBK-KtmcSv23tqw1cPhK1Mwc9tAkw0opMzhbWTowi6CW2XW_qrT-WLCznOL9zdEEkwWtcAgIXjrhWIZVHL-mrr5lsGsVVhCUTYBYBPUQ4QVjLBNcxKig1FNuyF6zgixAooBKMUtAE3ldnMIJW4mbG-otO7suhJyF1VffonYlWG6UIg4LiyaD3_YiLxtVtMVY0S35bYVudEoi1gWw1kekdAxEJ7IpysUJCBnrNJTavB91S8Yi3YS_bDUJLxMqfmyrW2u3L9BIZ5nFBhdB1jS8M3PcpiIRw-6toZx9Y0KVWxoavc6PHSY6Xn21DBYT8COSj47UXHE0QNa&c=m0KEx53ZmpWk0xjz99JzRgEnoUUxs3VVKpaGouzEHsIDGDXIT3dnwA==&ch=8sNfby1fvr0pDa2Eu305Qa_a48c_8d9TkmJnzfr9lEaxb8YMzBlHUg==)
[**-> That is 7 donations -- one a month until November. With your commitment of 7 donations, Susan's campaign will be able to continue the fight against those on the Far Left trying to dictate Maine's election.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGhvoEts1AfRvmmRfQ4LrFBK-KtmcSv23tqw1cPhK1Mwc9tAkw0opMzhbWTowi6CW2XW_qrT-WLCznOL9zdEEkwWtcAgIXjrhWIZVHL-mrr5lsGsVVhCUTYBYBPUQ4QVjLBNcxKig1FNuyF6zgixAooBKMUtAE3ldnMIJW4mbG-otO7suhJyF1VffonYlWG6UIg4LiyaD3_YiLxtVtMVY0S35bYVudEoi1gWw1kekdAxEJ7IpysUJCBnrNJTavB91S8Yi3YS_bDUJLxMqfmyrW2u3L9BIZ5nFBhdB1jS8M3PcpiIRw-6toZx9Y0KVWxoavc6PHSY6Xn21DBYT8COSj47UXHE0QNa&c=m0KEx53ZmpWk0xjz99JzRgEnoUUxs3VVKpaGouzEHsIDGDXIT3dnwA==&ch=8sNfby1fvr0pDa2Eu305Qa_a48c_8d9TkmJnzfr9lEaxb8YMzBlHUg==)
Especially during these turbulent times, our grassroots fundraising is more important than ever before. When we cannot hold in-person events, we rely on our supporters online _that much more_ to help Susan have the resources she needs to win in the fall.
We are asking for you to show your support by contributing 7 times in the next 7 months. [**Click HERE to become a sustaining donor of Susan 's campaign and help put an end to the Far Left influence in Maine!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGhvoEts1AfRvmmRfQ4LrFBK-KtmcSv23tqw1cPhK1Mwc9tAkw0opMzhbWTowi6CW2XW_qrT-WLCznOL9zdEEkwWtcAgIXjrhWIZVHL-mrr5lsGsVVhCUTYBYBPUQ4QVjLBNcxKig1FNuyF6zgixAooBKMUtAE3ldnMIJW4mbG-otO7suhJyF1VffonYlWG6UIg4LiyaD3_YiLxtVtMVY0S35bYVudEoi1gWw1kekdAxEJ7IpysUJCBnrNJTavB91S8Yi3YS_bDUJLxMqfmyrW2u3L9BIZ5nFBhdB1jS8M3PcpiIRw-6toZx9Y0KVWxoavc6PHSY6Xn21DBYT8COSj47UXHE0QNa&c=m0KEx53ZmpWk0xjz99JzRgEnoUUxs3VVKpaGouzEHsIDGDXIT3dnwA==&ch=8sNfby1fvr0pDa2Eu305Qa_a48c_8d9TkmJnzfr9lEaxb8YMzBlHUg==)
This election is not just about the future of Maine, it is about the future of the country. America cannot afford another Senator who is a rubber-stamp for Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. We need sensible, smart, and hardworking leaders who actually get things done -- _**we need Susan Collins.**_
Thank you for all your support. By becoming a sustaining donor of Susan's campaign, you are giving **the most generous and important contribution a donor can give.** It would truly make an incredible difference in Susan's fight.
Signed,
Team Collins
**P.S.[REMEMBER: before you click donate, make sure the "make this a monthly recurring donation" box is checked! This will secure your spot as a sustaining donor for Susan's campaign.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGhvoEts1AfRvmmRfQ4LrFBK-KtmcSv23tqw1cPhK1Mwc9tAkw0opMzhbWTowi6CW2XW_qrT-WLCznOL9zdEEkwWtcAgIXjrhWIZVHL-mrr5lsGsVVhCUTYBYBPUQ4QVjLBNcxKig1FNuyF6zgixAooBKMUtAE3ldnMIJW4mbG-otO7suhJyF1VffonYlWG6UIg4LiyaD3_YiLxtVtMVY0S35bYVudEoi1gWw1kekdAxEJ7IpysUJCBnrNJTavB91S8Yi3YS_bDUJLxMqfmyrW2u3L9BIZ5nFBhdB1jS8M3PcpiIRw-6toZx9Y0KVWxoavc6PHSY6Xn21DBYT8COSj47UXHE0QNa&c=m0KEx53ZmpWk0xjz99JzRgEnoUUxs3VVKpaGouzEHsIDGDXIT3dnwA==&ch=8sNfby1fvr0pDa2Eu305Qa_a48c_8d9TkmJnzfr9lEaxb8YMzBlHUg==)**

name: Margaret G.
subject: Help protect our healthcare workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17034534/181567004/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTBiMDBkMC1jOTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bo_1EXn6ZZtdhGJHtLBXt_2rJYtDvvGtz1pyd5_tRKg=&emci=5b42f1c6-c579-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=310b00d0-c979-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Team -- I don’t think it’s controversial to say that we are in debt to the doctors, nurses, and healthcare professionals putting their lives on the line to save ours during this crisis. But as it stands right now, there’s a shortage of critical personal protective equipment (PPE) like gowns, gloves, N95 masks, and respirators -- which means that the people on the frontlines of this pandemic are having to work without the equipment that would keep them safe. This is wrong -- and Donald Trump could easily use the Defense Production Act to accelerate the production of PPEs. So far he has failed to do so, leaving so many of our healthcare professionals to risk their lives. [**I’m taking a stand. clean_body: Team -- I don’t think it’s controversial to say that we are in debt to the doctors, nurses, and healthcare professionals putting their lives on the line to save ours during this crisis. But as it stands right now, there’s a shortage of critical personal protective equipment (PPE) like gowns, gloves, N95 masks, and respirators -- which means that the people on the frontlines of this pandemic are having to work without the equipment that would keep them safe. This is wrong -- and Donald Trump could easily use the Defense Production Act to accelerate the production of PPEs. So far he has failed to do so, leaving so many of our healthcare professionals to risk their lives. | Healthcare professionals are already fighting on the frontlines of a pandemic, with thousands of people ill across Florida and the country. The least we can do is provide them the equipment they need to perform their jobs safely. Thanks to everyone joining me in taking action, and an even bigger thanks to our doctors, nurses, and healthcare workers. \-- Margaret | To be removed from this email list, please . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20LaTurner?=
subject: Lessons learned from riding a bike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c0d2f6d2b3bf/looking-on-the-bright-side-6299153?e=1050d051da)
---
| | Friends,

We are adjusting to a new routine at our home and have started to notice an increased level of gratitude for the little things. It is really easy to get bogged down in all the things we can't do right now that we used to be able to do, but we are trying to teach the kids that when we count our blessings, we feel a lot better about life.

Our spunky little Maggie taught us the sweetest lesson this week as we watched her learn to ride a bike. Watching her get back up and try again and again and again, and then seeing the smile on her face when she finally experienced success... It was so heartwarming I wanted to share it with you.

---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=10989c771c&e=1050d051da)
---
|
I love having my family all here to share these teaching moments with. I learn something new from each of them everyday. Don't give up. Count your blessings. The future is bright.

God bless you and your loved ones.

Sincerely,

Suzanne LaTurner

If you want to stay up to date on what is going on in our household, you can follow Jake on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/JakeLaTurnerKS/](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9eb41f60f5&e=1050d051da)

subject: Ivanka Trump Lassos $1.6B for Virus-Slammed Small Companies
body:
"Initiated at a mid-March meeting with banking leaders at the White House, several this week [ millions of dollars of help to supplement..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1389394c03&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump Lassos $1.6B for Virus-Slammed Small Companies**

“Ivanka Trump, President Trump’s jobs czar, and Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin have rallied American banks to pony up $1.6 billion to help small businesses and Main Street Americans crushed by the coronavirus,” Paul Bedard reports in the _Washington Examiner_.

“Initiated at a mid-March meeting with banking leaders at the White House, several this week [pledged] millions of dollars of help to supplement the billions of dollars set aside by the administration and Congress for programs such as the Payroll Protection Plan.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c5354f1d24&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The COVID-19 crisis demands collaboration, unity, and common purpose. Unfortunately, Trump Derangement Syndrome has critically afflicted far too many of my colleagues across the aisle. Many people wish we could force politicians to shut down their partisan gamesmanship as easily as we shut down coffee shops and diners. Sadly, we can’t,” Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-FL) writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73d10c2cde&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump unveiled a new hashtag yesterday to highlight Americans helping one another during the Coronavirus pandemic. He’ll use “the #AmericaWorksTogether hashtag to promote companies that are hiring employees in the middle of the economic turmoil caused by the virus and those who are donating food and other supplies to front line health care workers,” John Fritze and Courtney Subramanian report for [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d2e694e7e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| When President Trump limited travel from China in January—a move that bought America precious time—the World Health Organization slammed the decision. “The record is clear: The WHO has lent its imprimatur to Chinese disinformation and blessed China’s slow response to its domestic outbreak, which likely caused a 20-fold increase in cases,” the [_**National Review**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=de53688319&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

body:
in times of crisis, we fight together. **ALERT: OUR SMALL BUSINESSES ARE HARD AT WORK TO PROVIDE FOR OUR COMMUNITIES IN THIS DIFFICULT TIME.[JOIN ME TO HELP SUPPORT THEM TODAY >>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dddb94cefc234e1a9385b7dbe5e133f3&_e=gGASfDZ6sW6y-ck29catLACA9qhCsdJpkDlLP7iTAenRJF73bukpL5yLKo6Dqxz-M6q9XQjS0E9Dgig_mp7_jO9TVYKNHBIY-BM-SpjuV2GjR64ExTV_LxIBi0EP6sOZW-IJpx1GUIZ-jnNuWR97rmWYV17xFXwAEmA5MBF6A8bhgizfBL_41WgngRNbmnc6GF78smRUB4FnFIkEOprWtLmEx31T_V9ZsMhFipaKsSQr9SGTAZvjRkS2luk4BImkMHttD9A0aq36JhGUNhWppzN7oom6Qc2PvXJOhZLdZfYQodevQttUIh0wyhoBGB6unO2N44uopvZ1Qp2gzbWeDYR7KcGY14-rIiNkdvh7_k76miXPl6S1rFVJiyGO1fJ7_QrMvO5OlmAwQeS_jvIwfpAHxLyt18TB6gWGPQreUQDw4-fXm_I-wmQ3w_0cBY09_GKz0eBzUhyMLdDw5WFctC1a6f33qtjattTmsLo544o%3D)** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dddb94cefc234e1a9385b7dbe5e133f3&_e=gGASfDZ6sW6y-ck29catLACA9qhCsdJpkDlLP7iTAenRJF73bukpL5yLKo6Dqxz-M6q9XQjS0E9Dgig_mp7_jO9TVYKNHBIY-BM-SpjuV2GjR64ExTV_LxIBi0EP6sOZW-IJpx1GUIZ-jnNuWR97rmWYV17xFXwAEmA5MBF6A8bhgizfBL_41WgngRNbmnc6GF78smRUB4FnFIkEOprWtLmEx31T_V9ZsMhFipaKsSQr9SGTAZvjRkS2luk4BImkMHttD9A0aq36JhGUNhWpp6nOsmSndKkAkS2T4X2pjOhWTQZGpJh0908vcRX6_wrfClPgKmPf_rGPdUu7VzEickdUMJkBZ2rrWVQ2KT8V7sens8EDeuv4ODTKMlBxTa-VPYNQ-iE6K7QJY3MCM3XL4UhGMW0D-sxNTCUZIH8ZStFstbk8xkw8N6EBnn0f5WzvbsQNoOy32Ddurk_vueTtXnLcTvtdLKx25s5wdev6muE%3D) | |
---
Friend, New Yorkers are fighters.

_And in times of crisis, we fight together._

I’ve seen it before, and I’m proud to be seeing it again as we work through the Coronavirus crisis.

So many of our small businesses and restaurants are struggling right now. As a small businesswoman, I have seen these struggles firsthand. While our local businesses face tough realities balancing the books these past few months, they are STILL finding ways to give back to our community. It’s inspiring. And I wanted to highlight just a couple of the MANY inspiring stories throughout the 22nd district.
* **Pizza Plus in Camden has started a program to help sponsor families and give meals to kids.**
* **Shorty's Deli, also in Camden, is offering a 10% discount for first responders and veterans.**

The small business initiative we launched last week is helping provide support to these inspiring places and workers by encouraging everyone to order take out, or buy a gift card for a nurse or doctor, local police, or an EMT, or your local grocer.

**You can support Pizza Plus, Shorty’s Deli, and dozens more small businesses who are giving back at this link:[https://claudiaforcongress.com/support-local-businesses/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dddb94cefc234e1a9385b7dbe5e133f3&_e=gGASfDZ6sW6y-ck29catLACA9qhCsdJpkDlLP7iTAenRJF73bukpL5yLKo6Dqxz-M6q9XQjS0E9Dgig_mp7_jO9TVYKNHBIY-BM-SpjuV2GjR64ExTV_LxIBi0EP6sOZW-IJpx1GUIZ-jnNuWR97rmWYV17xFXwAEmA5MBF6A8bhgizfBL_41WgngRNbmnc6GF78smRUB4FnFIkEOprWtLmEx31T_V9ZsMhFipaKsSQr9SGTAZvjRkS2luk4BImkMHttD9A0aq36JhGUNhWppzAO7dk3co3SGAEUZppOv1lxzYStZ4HoCk45vLnMHjHNmdCAr0v_zhrxcvWPr05IBWFwfDAEsHj2liMGJr9T9F2RAsqpNEYojGvGBMH4bsbkMIFW3KvhTZZMwS90UYRU4-_StQNE0fYw7DGZoGjydENc-jdNICmhdZ3g4KVS5w0LzNjPD4H27RONo1ZtqI6Npi_mEBOf4VSRHpgOVA4UJBU%3D)**

Trust me, friend - I know our local restaurants, especially independently owned and operated ones, are cultural institutions in our Upstate communities.

While they’re supporting us - I want to make sure we support them, too.

And in times of crisis, we fight together. I’ve seen it before, and I’m proud to be seeing it again as we work through the Coronavirus crisis. So many of our small businesses and restaurants are struggling right now. As a small businesswoman, I have seen these struggles firsthand. While our local businesses face tough realities balancing the books these past few months, they are STILL finding ways to give back to our community. It’s inspiring. And I wanted to highlight just a couple of the MANY inspiring stories throughout the 22nd district. Pizza Plus in Camden has started a program to help sponsor families and give meals to kids. Shorty's Deli, also in Camden, is offering a 10% discount for first responders and veterans. The small business initiative we launched last week is helping provide support to these inspiring places and workers by encouraging everyone to order take out, or buy a gift card for a nurse or doctor, local police, or an EMT, or your local grocer. You can support Pizza Plus, Shorty’s Deli, and dozens more small businesses who are giving back at this link: Trust me, friend - I know our local restaurants, especially independently owned and operated ones, are cultural institutions in our Upstate communities. **The _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ is reporting that the volume of U.S. Sen. David Perdue’s stock trades TRIPLED from the last two years to the number of trades he made in March alone. These trades included selling casino shares and buying pharmaceutical and medical equipment stocks as Congress learned about the threat of the coronavirus pandemic, but continued to downplay the risk posed to the public.**

Friend, there isn’t much that needs to be said.

While much of the national focus has been rightfully directed towards U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler’s financial portfolio activity following the Senate briefing on coronavirus in January, **it appears that David Perdue also may have used insider information to his financial advantage while publicly applauding the Trump administration’s woefully inadequate response to the virus.**

As hundreds of thousands of Americans are sick with the coronavirus, medical personnel do not have the personal protective equipment or ventilators needed to deal with the crisis, and thousands of people are dying, Georgia Senators look to be self-dealing.

Georgia’s U.S. Senators have failed us. We cannot allow David Perdue to ride the chaos and the public’s fear into a second term in office. We cannot afford six more years of selfish greed from the highest levels of public service. He does not deserve to serve.

[**That’s why we need you to rush in a donation right now so that our campaign has the resources to fight back and defeat David Perdue this November. name: Team Christy
subject: Send a message on May 12th >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bb/29776869/a04457d/569f4aaa/609530618/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter,

There's a lot of reasons our election is so special -- but one of the big ones is that it will be a referendum on Trump's handling of the COVID-19 crisis.

President Trump failed to take this crisis seriously early on, spread medical misinformation, coerced governors into praising him in return for medical relief to their states, and still has yet to get enough tests and protective gear into our communities -- just to start.

Mike Garcia will not only put up with this behavior in Congress, but he will welcome it. He even has pledged to vote with President Trump 100% of the time. **A win for Garcia is a message of approval for the way things have gone under Trump.**

That's not the message we want to send from the 25th District.

**[And it's why we need Christy in Congress. Help send a message on May 12th that we're fed up with Trump's failed leadership: Chip in $5 or more right now to help elect Christy.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bb/29776869/a04457d/569f4aab/609530618/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDhfdHJ1bXByZWZlcmVuZHVtX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200408_trumpreferendum_non")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bb/29776869/a04457d/569f4aa4/609530618/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDhfdHJ1bXByZWZlcmVuZHVtX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200408_trumpreferendum_non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bb/29776869/a04457d/569f4aa5/609530618/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDhfdHJ1bXByZWZlcmVuZHVtX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200408_trumpreferendum_non&express_lane=true&amount=25")

Meanwhile, Christy is working with Republicans and Democrats in California to pass urgently needed relief for working families.

**This is the case we'll make to voters. But we can only do it with your support.**

**[So chip in $5 or more to Christy's campaign for Congress today -- we need leaders like her now more than ever.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bb/29776869/a04457d/569f4aab/609530618/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDhfdHJ1bXByZWZlcmVuZHVtX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200408_trumpreferendum_non")**

clean_body: | "" | | The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win. Peter, There's a lot of reasons our election is so special -- but one of the big ones is that it will be a referendum on Trump's handling of the COVID-19 crisis. President Trump failed to take this crisis seriously early on, spread medical misinformation, coerced governors into praising him in return for medical relief to their states, and still has yet to get enough tests and protective gear into our communities -- just to start. Mike Garcia will not only put up with this behavior in Congress, but he will welcome it. He even has pledged to vote with President Trump 100% of the time. A win for Garcia is a message of approval for the way things have gone under Trump. That's not the message we want to send from the 25th District. name: Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO)
subject: We must hold China accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
The COVID-19 global health pandemic has put America, and the rest of the world, at a standstill. Small business owners, school teachers, our local restaurants and other service industries are just a small fraction of Americans whose lives have effectively been turned upside down due to the negligence of China's Communist regime.
Friend,

The COVID-19 global health pandemic has put America, and the rest of the world, at a standstill. Small business owners, school teachers, our local restaurants, and other service industries are just a small fraction of American lives turned upside down due to the negligence of China's Communist regime.

As we work to aid our fellow Americans in this time of immense need, protect our economy, and maintain the spread of this disease, we must not forget to call out China and hold them accountable for their inaction and totalitarian rule during this time of crisis:
* **Prosecution, silencing, and punishment of the Chinese doctors who were whistleblowers sounding the alarm on COVID-19
**
* **Failure to act at the onset, thereby preventing a nearly 95% decrease in potential transmission early on in the new year
**
* **State-run media channels continuing to push out anti-American propaganda and misinformation to other countries and agencies, including the World Health Organization, which was also complicit in the mass cover-up of the disease spread**

**BOTTOM LINE: We must stand up to China 's Communist regime to ensure that these events of global proportion are left only for history to remember - will you sign your name today in support of standing up to China and condemning the Chinese government for threatening the health and economy of the entire world?**
**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V0OLDy-j-bHR8Orui95VEEXsk9tuLjmeFWQKcHS2M7nRvql4ZaDAsdouzV7VuJaozcCw2pKFYbfVy19tkWr9flkr6Cx5TVkUwCO1evctLsmFGNeExuHvkp4BrTC4LpLNnv2BUOBPMB05GwRDPrJIVeKWLMyqOVMPPC1If3LDwI0gkBzzyGUSp08PW9bs-tJ9KIiiv7N9itdwQcnCwTLujo6KLdrUk2y245EsduFtocqY7PSo5jRtjS_S6r8LBhrA-2c_dUYhFmCQGDhlLl_9ro0Om_1QXsJJUrSq0mn3yc6QxAgulXl_6GxXrniO_x9rIAkt1vZf1mhL7gW_W5SXmbh7usOcPNDENf0nIpCHn5AGeV8jkFCYY0oyeTi9tHsg&c=uLetAh3GwR-YdeBO_xnuIdrw9WFCRRXIMV-G2AjV7Csmt5XfJUmlxA==&ch=DH1uHNGkuP--5Xl5-doY1WQfISJcYMRoszz1x6FiMir6svQOhQOlDQ==)**
---

_We 're hoping to gain at least __**5,000 petition signatures**_ _from Americans like you who want to hold China accountable and take a stand against the Communist regime 's negligence and lies. Please, forward the petition _[**LINK**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V0OLDy-j-bHR8Orui95VEEXsk9tuLjmeFWQKcHS2M7nRvql4ZaDAsdouzV7VuJaozcCw2pKFYbfVy19tkWr9flkr6Cx5TVkUwCO1evctLsmFGNeExuHvkp4BrTC4LpLNnv2BUOBPMB05GwRDPrJIVeKWLMyqOVMPPC1If3LDwI0gkBzzyGUSp08PW9bs-tJ9KIiiv7N9itdwQcnCwTLujo6KLdrUk2y245EsduFtocqY7PSo5jRtjS_S6r8LBhrA-2c_dUYhFmCQGDhlLl_9ro0Om_1QXsJJUrSq0mn3yc6QxAgulXl_6GxXrniO_x9rIAkt1vZf1mhL7gW_W5SXmbh7usOcPNDENf0nIpCHn5AGeV8jkFCYY0oyeTi9tHsg&c=uLetAh3GwR-YdeBO_xnuIdrw9WFCRRXIMV-G2AjV7Csmt5XfJUmlxA==&ch=DH1uHNGkuP--5Xl5-doY1WQfISJcYMRoszz1x6FiMir6svQOhQOlDQ==) _to at least five family members and friends who want to sign their name in support of standing up to China today!_
Thanks in advance for adding your name, Friend.

I'm looking forward to keeping you up to date on our plans to combat China's aggression and disinformation campaigns in the fight against COVID-19.

Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO)

**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V0OLDy-j-bHR8Orui95VEEXsk9tuLjmeFWQKcHS2M7nRvql4ZaDAsdouzV7VuJaozcCw2pKFYbfVy19tkWr9flkr6Cx5TVkUwCO1evctLsmFGNeExuHvkp4BrTC4LpLNnv2BUOBPMB05GwRDPrJIVeKWLMyqOVMPPC1If3LDwI0gkBzzyGUSp08PW9bs-tJ9KIiiv7N9itdwQcnCwTLujo6KLdrUk2y245EsduFtocqY7PSo5jRtjS_S6r8LBhrA-2c_dUYhFmCQGDhlLl_9ro0Om_1QXsJJUrSq0mn3yc6QxAgulXl_6GxXrniO_x9rIAkt1vZf1mhL7gW_W5SXmbh7usOcPNDENf0nIpCHn5AGeV8jkFCYY0oyeTi9tHsg&c=uLetAh3GwR-YdeBO_xnuIdrw9WFCRRXIMV-G2AjV7Csmt5XfJUmlxA==&ch=DH1uHNGkuP--5Xl5-doY1WQfISJcYMRoszz1x6FiMir6svQOhQOlDQ==)**
---

_PS: As always, please stay home and help us flatten the curve of transmission with this virus. Make sure to continue to look out for your neighbors and loved ones as we weather this battle. I can assure you that we will endure this struggle and come back better than before, with a renewed sense of community and service to others. May God bless you and your loved ones during these difficult and uncertain times as we continue to navigate protecting the health and safety of all Americans in the coming months. _

**

** PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
---

name: Corky Messner
subject: 72 Hours Matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
My op-ed was recently featured in the New Hampshire Union Leader. Click or tap to read >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e80f6eba01936e75/a0c3749a91940bf6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Have you seen my **[most recent op-ed](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e80f6eba01936e75/542b1c0e561143dfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** in the _New Hampshire Union Leader_ , “In a crisis, 72 hours matter, and calls for bipartisanship don’t hide it?" It’s apparent that D.C. Jeanne Shaheen doesn’t have the best interests of Granite Staters in mind. After bragging about negotiating a deal, **she was seen laughing on the floor of the Senate and voting “no” not once, but twice**. Despite what her recent opinion editorial says, Senator Shaheen wasn’t worried about bipartisanship then, nor was she worried about getting help to Granite Staters. Peter, Jeanne Shaheen has shown her true colors, and it’s imperative that we get the word out to the rest of the state. **[Will you forward this email to three friends to make sure they get the message?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9&c=33153&jid=e80f6eba01936e75&d=495955c32d588b76c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/fwtf/fwtf.cfm?eid=cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9&c=33153&jid=e80f6eba01936e75)** In times of crisis like this, the American people need leadership, not petty partisanship. Jeanne Shaheen has been a puppet of her party bosses like Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and even socialist AOC. This past Sunday, the same day Senator Shaheen was calling for bipartisanship in her opinion editorial, Nancy Pelosi was blasting President Trump for what she said was his “deadly” denial of the pandemic’s early days, and that people died as a result. We shouldn’t expect Senator Shaheen to criticize Pelosi for this, given her loyalty to Pelosi. The two of them helped delay the CARES Act by 72 hours, and during those critical hours, the number of tragic deaths attributed to COVID-19 more than tripled. Yes, 72 hours matter in a crisis. -Corky [ Spread the word – Forward to a friend! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9&c=33153&jid=e80f6eba01936e75&d=301d7f3662e5824fc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/fwtf/fwtf.cfm?eid=cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9&c=33153&jid=e80f6eba01936e75) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e80f6eba01936e75/935fbb14bc98ee7bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e80f6eba01936e75/9ee87ce90062143ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
---|---

P.O. Box 10370, Bedford, NH, 03110

Senator Bernie Sanders Suspends 2020 Presidential Campaign** [**Add your name to our Thank You Card for Bernie! ->**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0511/72412298/4e209d9d/6104d909/1879396023/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+our+Thank+You+Card+for+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1")
* * *
Peter, Bernie Sanders JUST announced he is suspending his campaign for president. Bernie brought important issues to this primary -- from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal. **In both of his campaigns for president, he brought MILLIONS of new voters and activists into the Democratic Party. We 're so proud of the work he's done for Democrats, so we are sending him a thank you card from supporters like you. [Can you take 30 seconds to sign our card?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0511/72412298/4e209d9d/6104d908/1879396023/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+take+30+seconds+to+sign+our+card&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1")** | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0511/72412298/4e209d9d/6104d90b/1879396023/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1")
---
We know that suspending a presidential campaign is never an easy decision. Bernie Sanders and the coalition of supporters he had are some of the most DEDICATED progressives in politics.
**Bernie may be suspending his campaign, but we know that he will NEVER stop fighting for a bold progressive platform.**
[**We want to show Bernie that Democrats in every corner of the country are thinking about him today. So please, take 30 seconds to sign our THANK YOU card to Bernie Sanders for running a great campaign! ->**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0511/72412298/4e209d9d/6104d90a/1879396023/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+We+want+to+show+Bernie+that+Democrats+in&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200408_ThankYouBernie_U2_X1")

clean_body: | "" | | BREAKING: Senator Bernie Sanders Suspends 2020 Presidential Campaign "" Peter, Bernie Sanders JUST announced he is suspending his campaign for president. Bernie brought important issues to this primary -- from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal. In both of his campaigns for president, he brought MILLIONS of new voters and activists into the Democratic Party. We 're so proud of the work he's done for Democrats, so we are sending him a thank you card from supporters like you. "" | "" We know that suspending a presidential campaign is never an easy decision. Bernie Sanders and the coalition of supporters he had are some of the most DEDICATED progressives in politics. Bernie may be suspending his campaign, but we know that he will NEVER stop fighting for a bold progressive platform.** "" Thanks, \-- the Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
