name: Matt (Team Rodney)
subject: Can we count on you in the days ahead?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
We're going to have to work hard in the days ahead to get rid of the Left's digital advantage if we are to have a fighting chance to defend Downstate and win in November.
Friend,
Like all campaigns, we've halted face to face campaign events and made this campaign entirely digital to follow the CDC and President Trump's guidelines. Now we have to get past another hurdle that is standing in the way of our ability to defend Downstate this November.
We have found out that Rodney's opponent, Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan has unlimited access to the Democrats' digital fundraising machine, thanks to her status within the DCCC's "Red to Blue" program! Because of this, her campaign has gained critical ground at this key point in the election cycle. She's in a good position.
We are at serious risk of falling behind. [_**Can you help us fight back?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001upyW69yhMS3E0VNKhSxMnyzN4tn7FVSpPWjz5DjX8tW8jFJGnZY0EkL08AmouabGzXaWNvagFe4VyefOKyrOVwhV_LJSylj5KYNOwXXVHmnREBvf04gPSqQ7zvlWjfx4i5aEFR89leFVoeO-S6P4Mu5UnhTzcF-jS918adyyEr7j0zWKQjxqttZhGDTs9HU2xOHkhxRFRtWErRPift-3902Cv3zNoVuqgS0vap6-kTL4B8lRcLW94CJoXRKZhsU6E_9LdSscab2ltez_F9Lb4-RWjneKqybkDrXyMyqgWrGpp81H8vEDpbroyLBNlw6h68-e3Z1MOlBRik3A6TWfOPcUbQ8b0-oYDVZP2xgANDtEKsRIyI12V4nngKgT2CK0qAyIgOmDtSlWltfLsvYKbQ==&c=ql6v9izVW8EawwgXzPb5lwQVj84y3T_4uab7c-gMb0Yjwez4w7UPkQ==&ch=P7FyXxbN7IybJd0nZTqAFztl0ILnEIT1bH3xdJCQMYT0uawlrpurAw==)

name: Joni Ernst
subject: Our goal is within reach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
We're so close to reaching our goal of 250 new monthly donors, but we're just a few sign ups short - 83 to be exact.
Hey Friend,

We're so close to reaching our goal of 250 new monthly donors, but we're just a few sign ups short - _83 to be exact._

Could you help us out?

A monthly contribution of any size - whether it's $1 or $100 - will help us reach our digital goals each month and keep our fight going strong.

[_**CLICK HERE to make a monthly commitment!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5ADpndKAsNYSe_i00E5YhiHRz7No0xOyNd8mGt2b-pLmtkZHR6zVgliH8Kj2xllc4r-WaK5Q6lvZdDKx5a48r3tV91BMakERbsWrbRAg7kO1cHgWXcI7-3pPrLE3_rcxLbkTYQQ26317wxDFPS3WLdvcw14E9PmclEZiS3dZ5UZazbK0qYYh9B2ALugxAjqiX066E84_cAK3_qAjQ_e3mog68ipm3TJv2FgwRNXoXnBk2c-Iq8YkjncHcey_OXS6A2J755g5CcrfWnW_bAK-gYL1MwnjCzI-JrbGev62lI5xXjtzHnGzAaM8OB0x0i4B7PZyQor2jYnJ3eOsGYI-deQB0PxBR5f&c=KY9Z5a0062gxOizhC1dO3CJ28OXJa2hnhpylAJT1IacIgDMREzWP9A==&ch=WyDxK6qqENf_lcurvTaCusrzz4ILYF3xX49ILV5robLCEAkB06K-Ig==)

Your support matters more now than ever before. We must meet our online digital goals if we're going to stop Schumer from buying Iowa's Senate seat outright. So please, Friend, if you're able, commit to a monthly donation today of any size.

[**
Sign up here to go monthly!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5ADpndKAsNYSe_i00E5YhiHRz7No0xOyNd8mGt2b-pLmtkZHR6zVgliH8Kj2xllc4r-WaK5Q6lvZdDKx5a48r3tV91BMakERbsWrbRAg7kO1cHgWXcI7-3pPrLE3_rcxLbkTYQQ26317wxDFPS3WLdvcw14E9PmclEZiS3dZ5UZazbK0qYYh9B2ALugxAjqiX066E84_cAK3_qAjQ_e3mog68ipm3TJv2FgwRNXoXnBk2c-Iq8YkjncHcey_OXS6A2J755g5CcrfWnW_bAK-gYL1MwnjCzI-JrbGev62lI5xXjtzHnGzAaM8OB0x0i4B7PZyQor2jYnJ3eOsGYI-deQB0PxBR5f&c=KY9Z5a0062gxOizhC1dO3CJ28OXJa2hnhpylAJT1IacIgDMREzWP9A==&ch=WyDxK6qqENf_lcurvTaCusrzz4ILYF3xX49ILV5robLCEAkB06K-Ig==)

subject: Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hey folks! We’re adjusting our strategy amid the coronavirus outbreak and we’re stretching every dollar as far as we can. With that in mind, we wanted to make sure you saw the latest news: **Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ released a new analysis saying Democrats are in a strong position to flip the Senate in November.** On top of that, a number of polls show Democrats surging in races across the country — leaving Republicans on defense in states like Arizona, Colorado, Maine, North Carolina, Montana, and more. We have a real shot at taking back the Senate, but we must hold strong in places like Minnesota. If we lose Tina’s seat, virtually any chance of flipping the Senate goes out the window. **So, what do you say? Will you help us capitalize on this momentum and make sure we have enough resources to save Minnesota’s Senate seat? name: Team Gianforte
subject: Montana needs a business leader!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG FOR MONTANA, REPUBLICAN
body:
Montana is in desperate need of business leadership now, more than ever.
Friend,
Montana is in desperate need of business leadership now, more than ever.
In Congress, we've seen that Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats' agenda is more focused on running partisan investigations against the president rather than enacting legislation that puts Americans first!
President Trump's business leadership continues to put America first. Business leadership is exactly what Montana needs, and as your next Governor, Greg Gianforte will use his own business leadership of over two decades to put our state on a better path to prosperity.
Just like President Trump, Greg Gianforte is conservative leader with business experience. Montana needs a leader who is ready to take decisive action to protect our Montana way of life as Governor.

#
Hello — I hope you and your loved ones are staying healthy and safe during this uncertain time. It’s hard to believe how much our lives have changed in just a few short weeks. **But, as always, this incredible grassroots team gives me hope for the future.** Even though we have to do a few things differently now (like holding virtual events and video conferences -- see some highlights below!), our message remains the same: **I’m running for U.S. Senate because Colorado deserves an independent leader who will bring people together to actually get things done. ** **** Moving our entire operation online was the right thing to do, but it means my team and I will be relying on messages like this more than ever before. **Especially since Mitch McConnell isn’t slowing down -- his shady super PAC just announced $67 million in ads targeting Senate races like ours! ** Now more than ever, we’re depending on people like you chipping in what they can to help us fight back, win this Senate race, and make Washington work for all Coloradans. **If you’re financially able, can I count on you to add a grassroots donation of $10 or more today to help us build the different kind of campaign we’ll need to beat Republicans’ dark money network and flip this Senate seat? ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17041045/181629044/-1222139983?refcode=jwh-em-200408-quick&express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTkzYjE4Yy1lMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUICf8t55IwtFDOZh3_Y5AXMaEM8AWcN_0xH9fHiL_U=)

body:
The reality is whoever wins this seat will determine who has the House Majority and Michelle needs our help now more than ever.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g9L671OfmfRuWs7Y8Z-QxH6dEBHrGP9T_KRpCG3RbtRon218eYoSim_x1KKyPu3uGJQLP-jiB0aziXPil_-0BQZ0_XMEEQBjDd6OMcvUei8kNhaJfI188IQ9VzooWffMCvB9VEDL9I3weO-rqV3SD4-DESh11vk9oodart2R9bli3_jXJ3weaNjcKTTW48gcNh0YbolAAimwglb3Uqpbj7YLTe91yUl13fYi3kP1qXjnsXJwD7u8xkKNR9fvMExApd7yHn6hsYt5fwm_wTqNBqHJYkr8FJuUjabjUe0jGKUtYhT5b0msuMvjYR4yN493W9dzHhhw78DYdiOy7c59RRdcdTuaATuCBijU43ejdrJcj8UJkngGB_m58TqtalDl&c=fSecRXzkGuhH1hQr7E0YOyeu93uVRNA7iD_SxFntuzyKXG4NR8H0IQ==&ch=GYGNCvWoycRyb3cxWzTYvg6Of1_x95pDPb770PZC-pIsyPFwO6574w==)

Because that's the reality we're facing. Whoever wins this race will determine who controls the House Majority and this is our chance to make history.

Michelle Steel is a first generation American fighting for commonsense, conservative reform and has even pledged to vote against any new taxes or tax increases. And she has the resume to get it done -- she led the fight to return over $400 million dollars to taxpayers.

[**We need 500 of our grassroots supporters to chip in $5 to get our momentum back. We had a lot of momentum coming out of the primary and it's all but come to a halt. It's no easy task, but we need to make up lost ground if we're going to have a fighting chance come November.

[**Every inch of ground we can take back gets us closer to victory. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Stopping The Next Pandemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Our Nation, and the world at large, is struggling through a major public health and economic crisis. We will get through this and we’ll come out more united than ever. And as we look forward, it is critical that we work to stop the next major pandemic before it starts.

To stop the next pandemic from ravaging our society, killing thousands and damaging the world economy we need to recognize the bad actors from the Coronavirus and punish the behavior that allowed the virus to blossom. That bad actor is the authoritarian, oppressive Chinese government.

While the Chinese scientific and medical community identified the destructive nature of the Coronavirus early, the Chinese government refused to assist and in fact engaged in a massive cover up that resulted in our current crisis. Instead of listening to their doctors and scientists, they arrested and silenced them. Instead of sharing data and helping the world prepare, China hid the facts and lied to the world. Even now, after many of their lies were outed, the Chinese government is still using it’s propaganda machine to obfuscate the events in Wuhan, and even blame the United States.

If we had better information and data from China, the rest of the world would have been able to react accordingly, attempt a more coherent containment strategy and begin preparing our medical systems for a potential infection.

The Chinese government lied and it has cost the world tens of thousands of lives and trillions of dollars in economic output.

I support the [Li Wenliang Global Public Health Accountability Act](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e7bfa1cd77364e2cb6975eede9c84129&_e=Sy2LFReU6AO3pnVy77C1h7OdSM359gQn7jxyQOb5cBNDdDiQYow8fgp9nDR5EJDVqzhxZ3rdSNgHqiKxHwGgphN9lbAUFYeuYY06_78HVfo0U_YKW9gHUgOni2bj2h6bED23NchoXc4ofgsnWS_YiDAK1Gp5Sbu2vuKuNJSX0mQ5VNgJ_laPqHOpZkimhWIHWZnU1TdSFcu11_ATcs5jd2ItWOIH2xxrYTl_7My-1inSZzV2fUQD7-xXayIRDi2HPxYQwXgt0wqMzLfE4BYie3m7ndsErwZcAvBzL7Ei2I8eSMCxBRm6IelDaXEUxFq0M6xgmmaZ8x0d3lVVKRqz7g%3D%3D) to address the actions of governments like China’s. This legislation authored by Senator Tom Cotton, Rep. Liz Cheney and others, gives the President of the United States the authority to punish foreign officials for suppressing information about international health crises. We need to start holding the bad actors accountable for their decisions to put the world at risk.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e7bfa1cd77364e2cb6975eede9c84129&_e=Sy2LFReU6AO3pnVy77C1h3BdWW7ZtWNDb-RZjJ0C7KsGptM0Q3f8ZbGytL7GEyOPs4nsZBMV4_ya01sqIhLO4GTs1JuDNJoxHhRiStZWRHaZp0B1FRZV97hUwMUsiGqotiMsdbglafP8mlp66rpTO0SrFuYoWExeWEYddij5YaALwLPcWXiaCOMXKytpGfIJj7_w-pwPC__ujUYsqxjpZfRBlinBF5VSr6Tuj3qLEAAyv6p4FxweYogVunyBcAOae6Wyu8aLvNTxm-qmhKMRojx4TFQGbGddsr0cv5o9eRM%3D)****

While the Chinese scientific and medical community identified the destructive nature of the Coronavirus early, the Chinese government refused to assist and in fact engaged in a massive cover up that resulted in our current crisis. Instead of listening to their doctors and scientists, they arrested and silenced them. Instead of sharing data and helping the world prepare, China hid the facts and lied to the world. Even now, after many of their lies were outed, the Chinese government is still using it’s propaganda machine to obfuscate the events in Wuhan, and even blame the United States. If we had better information and data from China, the rest of the world would have been able to react accordingly, attempt a more coherent containment strategy and begin preparing our medical systems for a potential infection. The Chinese government lied and it has cost the world tens of thousands of lives and trillions of dollars in economic output. I support the to address the actions of governments like China’s. This legislation authored by Senator Tom Cotton, Rep. Liz Cheney and others, gives the President of the United States the authority to punish foreign officials for suppressing information about international health crises. We need to start holding the bad actors accountable for their decisions to put the world at risk. Sincerely, Wesley Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Here's the bottom line:
* Senator Cornyn is vulnerable -- facing "the most difficult election of his career."
* But MJ is the only one who can beat him -- with your help.
* Every day until Election Day matters.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentucky is not for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Our movement doesn't need $12 million, or even $7 million. But what we do need is just enough.
#
Last night, Mitch McConnell and my Democratic opponent reported the astronomical sums of money they’ve raised so far:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17042129/181639031/988755505?refcode=em20200408-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M4MjJiMS1lNTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-Y2hlW-RVqohH72rT1h2Aa1kYuGmaN9nLqRz1zhVRc=)
You and I both know that while our movement is gaining momentum by the day, our fundraising numbers don't look anything like this. I'm proud to say it's because we're running on a platform that benefits working people, not rich folks. And on top of that, we don’t take big checks from oil, gas, and coal industry executives, lobbyists, or corporate PACs.
**The truth is no Democrat is going to defeat Mitch because they outspent him.** We're going to defeat him with a grassroots movement of people fighting for the change they believe in. Our clear, bold message and the real conversations we're having with voters are more powerful than a million-dollar check.
We don't need to raise as much as our opponents – but we do need just enough.
So I'm asking: **[will you chip in $5, $10, $15 – whatever you can afford today – to our campaign so we can have just enough to beat Mitch McConnell and win our future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17042156/181639058/988755505?refcode=em20200408-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M4MjJiMS1lNTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-Y2hlW-RVqohH72rT1h2Aa1kYuGmaN9nLqRz1zhVRc=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17042158/181639060/988755505?refcode=em20200408-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M4MjJiMS1lNTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-Y2hlW-RVqohH72rT1h2Aa1kYuGmaN9nLqRz1zhVRc=)****
The Democratic party – which has traditionally been entrenched with wealthy, corporate establishment interests – has lost to Mitch McConnell five times already, and they're running the exact same losing (expensive!) playbook. Despite all the money they've poured into their candidates, the party hasn't been successful in turning the seat.
That’s because we haven't had a real Democrat – one who shares the interests of everyday Kentuckians – challenge Mitch with a platform that promises a fight for real change. That is, _until now._
**I am the only candidate running on a platform that speaks to the biggest challenges working-class Kentuckians face.**
We don't need $12 million to beat Mitch, but we need enough just to power our grassroots strategy, reach enough of our voters, and win. **[So please, help fund our grassroots strategy and give whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17042159/181639061/988755505?refcode=em20200408-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M4MjJiMS1lNTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-Y2hlW-RVqohH72rT1h2Aa1kYuGmaN9nLqRz1zhVRc=)**
Let’s do this,
Charles

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17042160/181639062/988755505?refcode=em20200408-2-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M4MjJiMS1lNTc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-Y2hlW-RVqohH72rT1h2Aa1kYuGmaN9nLqRz1zhVRc=)****

body:
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YTuDo9Q4gIjE-jnNywq8SWNLQYlhsE6bJSf6oPMqjWwGc6QLdXL6BDfCSLfi0xYQ3RyqevDYQnAzJUyFtI0nwudNoTQPJskicIUU8R_cfd3FLuFAZJYq0IcH4mQSJrsu3vhf1RgzRuMbl4Ia5qU9ZQIDpJ_jVsr40iNlRITFJuJMpY68ADzThs1qGknAG-n6-u2CEtjUNbguQ7v1UHJocAFSqulKuYmFmgljdh3alJoNC6xRzgI0QdvF07RUKiYMLZlG_sIZzY6iJaxoyGwnOzbLFj-tDWCgIH8MPWmiqwLl6t6EvXIFVOypJ5b8QjjbWYtGWTNctaqSKx10--IvlMuptgVauVwesKkmml3wYbDJCsLlU3iyT1YKzGXRwsEE&c=wCIwoLxy_6rHoVjQiad876i0LLl0E_t1YJNxvMzf2VUYNvLT-EADuw==&ch=1KLXEDYMXqZ9Os18JKhoKI5YF5A7Rjz1pfpo8G00X2welCJsIlq-Wg==)
Friend,

IT'S OFFICIAL -- I'm in! This morning I filed for office in Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District.

[**WATCH MY SPECIAL VIDEO MESSAGE HERE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YTuDo9Q4gIjE-jnNywq8SWNLQYlhsE6bJSf6oPMqjWwGc6QLdXL6BDfCSLfi0xYQNb6LL7PlOpHiouHdvSbeH0eyF76Q_o3eYkJcAyIfGCVyX5GTbRUl86ZXyQcrsVJEbBegy29_vtztkap9326f5OzzKDe7FhNk04d4iH2m2Es_suEI4SKGOfhnMbj-kiGa1-suMpkDw-9ZXV5M4MA_cjQLrnerOnVwHwrjOXYPp-lUxk0AVtwdL1Joklc5qjxZ8LT-Fo6YMp57GPmmKKmvreu5TIZe11Femjt9PZYFGGxcR7JL1wDswtTBGp45f9YFCrIjsJAO8-wbnBcV-z4Ea_5zJp7QmMRAkO3IC7byI076aPcqvAFS7nR8stt6ygqm&c=wCIwoLxy_6rHoVjQiad876i0LLl0E_t1YJNxvMzf2VUYNvLT-EADuw==&ch=1KLXEDYMXqZ9Os18JKhoKI5YF5A7Rjz1pfpo8G00X2welCJsIlq-Wg==)
We launched our campaign a little less than a year ago, and it has been an incredible journey so far. Today, I am able to reflect on the people who helped get me here and what this day, April 8th, truly means. My family and my team have supported me every step of the way, but you, Friend, are the reason I am fighting to represent OK-05 in Washington.

I want you to know that I truly appreciate the support you've given me so far. Now that we're less than 90 days out from the primary election, we can't afford to slow down.

I'm all in, Friend, I'm committed to returning this seat to Republican control in November and I need your help to dominate the primary and unseat Kendra Horn this November.

clean_body: | == Friend, IT'S OFFICIAL -- I'm in! This morning I filed for office in Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District. == We launched our campaign a little less than a year ago, and it has been an incredible journey so far. Today, I am able to reflect on the people who helped get me here and what this day, April 8th, truly means. My family and my team have supported me every step of the way, but you, Friend, are the reason I am fighting to represent OK-05 in Washington. I want you to know that I truly appreciate the support you've given me so far. Now that we're less than 90 days out from the primary election, we can't afford to slow down. I'm all in, Friend, I'm committed to returning this seat to Republican control in November and I need your help to dominate the primary and unseat Kendra Horn this November. == == == == == == == In Congress, I promise to be the leader and representative that OK-05 needs. I will never take your trust for granted, and I hope that you will help me defeat Kendra Horn, so together, we can give Oklahoma the conservative leadership it deserves. name: Our Revolution [Important]
subject: Bernie's mission is more urgent than ever. We must carry the torch forward.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Bernie Sanders has dropped out of the 2020 Democratic presidential primary race. This is not the outcome that we've wanted, and it's easy to feel disappointed right now -- **but nothing actually ends today. Thank you, Bernie, for bringing the issues we care about the most to the forefront.**

"Not me. Us." wasn't just a campaign slogan for Bernie. It was an admission that electoral campaigns are inherently temporary, and that the only path toward real justice for working people is long-term mass mobilization and participation in the political process.

The truth is, what has always separated Bernie from other candidates is you, and the millions of Americans like you. People who understand what the Democratic Party should be. People who understand that health care and economic security are basic human rights. People who believe that if one of us isn't free, none of us are.

Bernie's presidential campaigns became a movement that brought millions of Americans into the political process. That terrified the Democratic establishment, and now, they're hoping our movement will finally disappear so they can get back to business as usual.

For nearly four years, Our Revolution has worked at the local and national levels to bring working-class and young people into the political process. Together, we are rebuilding the Democratic Party from the bottom up. Today, our work continues.

[_**Donate now to help Our Revolution continue transforming our country. Bernie started us down this path, and we must continue.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0420?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=27&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Donate+now+to+help+Our+Revolution+contin&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1&source=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1") If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | [CHIP IN $10 IMMEDIATELY »](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0420?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+CHIP+IN+10+IMMEDIATELY+raquo&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1&source=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1")

---
**Some Americans overvalue the importance of political figureheads and undervalue the impact of systems, institutions, and, most importantly, grassroots movements.**

As a global pandemic wreaks havoc on our health care and economic systems, it has never been more important to challenge big money's control of our political system and fight for guaranteed health care, employment, and a social safety net strong enough to protect American workers.

We never thought that any of this would be easy. We always knew that the forces that benefit from these systems would fight changes at every step of the way.

**The only way we can prevail is to stand together in solidarity and organize -- and that's exactly our plan. Lives are at stake, and we can't stop fighting for a more just country.**

[_**Contribute here to help us keep organizing to build the long-term power necessary to ensure that every American is guaranteed health care, education, a safe workplace, and more.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0420?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=27&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+Contribute+here+to+help+us+keep+organizi&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1&source=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1")

Many of the issues that Bernie brought to the forefront -- from getting big money out of politics to Medicare for All -- are now widely popular ideas. It's on **US** to continue pushing forward until they are legislative reality.

What led to Donald Trump's election is the deep structural rot of a broken system that answers to the wealthy and powerful at the expense of the health and security of the rest of us.

**Our Revolution remains dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society.**

Together, we are building a national grassroots network of powerful local groups who are winning progressive issue fights, electing progressive champions, transforming the Democratic Party.

The future of the United States depends on our ability to continue building a movement powerful enough to defeat the special interests who will do whatever it takes to prevent us from restoring a democracy of the people.

[_**Donate to support our collective mission to build the long-term power necessary to make Bernie 's progressive vision a reality.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0420?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=27&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+Donate+to+support+our+collective+mission&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1&source=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1")

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

* * *

Join our movement by **[following us on Facebook](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7bcc6/bed43eb/bc84b257/75f50fee/2151561036/VEsHAQ/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://www.facebook.com/PoliticalRevolution?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=14+-+following+us+on+Facebook&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1&source=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1")** and **[signing up here to volunteer.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7bcc6/bed43eb/bc84b257/75f50fe9/2151561036/VEsHAA/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/membership-signup?source=email-footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=15+-+signing+up+here+to+volunteer&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_365DO_200408_2_1")**

For nearly four years, Our Revolution has worked at the local and national levels to bring working-class and young people into the political process. Together, we are rebuilding the Democratic Party from the bottom up. Today, our work continues. "" If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Some Americans overvalue the importance of political figureheads and undervalue the impact of systems, institutions, and, most importantly, grassroots movements. As a global pandemic wreaks havoc on our health care and economic systems, it has never been more important to challenge big money's control of our political system and fight for guaranteed health care, employment, and a social safety net strong enough to protect American workers. We never thought that any of this would be easy. We always knew that the forces that benefit from these systems would fight changes at every step of the way. The only way we can prevail is to stand together in solidarity and organize -- and that's exactly our plan. Lives are at stake, and we can't stop fighting for a more just country. "" Many of the issues that Bernie brought to the forefront -- from getting big money out of politics to Medicare for All -- are now widely popular ideas. It's on US to continue pushing forward until they are legislative reality. What led to Donald Trump's election is the deep structural rot of a broken system that answers to the wealthy and powerful at the expense of the health and security of the rest of us. Our Revolution remains dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. Together, we are building a national grassroots network of powerful local groups who are winning progressive issue fights, electing progressive champions, transforming the Democratic Party. The future of the United States depends on our ability to continue building a movement powerful enough to defeat the special interests who will do whatever it takes to prevent us from restoring a democracy of the people. "" In solidarity, Our Revolution "" "" "" "" Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. >From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. "" Join our movement by "" and "" ""** PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Warner for Virginia
subject: Election security in the age of Coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Tell Congress:
Let Americans vote by mail

[Become a citizen co-sponsor of the Natural Disaster and Emergency Ballot Act >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d503/53d9897e/54d844d8/1c899c76/3653356970/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votebymailpetition") Derek --

Mark Warner is proud to sponsor the Natural Disaster and Emergency Ballot Act. **This important bill would allow voters nationwide to cast their ballot by mail and would expand in-person early voting to prevent large gatherings.**

Thanks to our leadership in the General Assembly, Virginians already have access to vote-by-mail and a 45-day window for in-person early voting, and Mark is stepping up to make sure we expand voting access for every American.

As our country continues to face the coronavirus outbreak, it's critical that Congress act quickly to pass this bill to expand voting access. People across the country are taking physical distancing seriously, and it's important that they have the resources they need to continue following public health directives. **That includes being able to safely exercise their right to vote.**

**[Will you add your name in support of expanded vote by mail and early voting options?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d503/53d9897e/54d844d8/1c899c76/3653356970/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votebymailpetition")**

While these changes are needed immediately to stop the spread of COVID-19, they would remain permanent and ensure that all Americans are able to vote during any natural disaster or emergency.

Virginia has already made voting easier and safer with "no-excuse" voting by mail, but millions of Americans still don't have access to voting-by-mail. **Many elected leaders -- including President Trump -- continue to resist this urgently needed change to the voting process.**

**Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of this new bill that expands vote by mail and early voting nationwide?** **[ADD YOUR NAME AS A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d503/53d9897e/54d844d8/1c899c76/3653356970/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votebymailpetition")** Thank you for your support,

-- Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d503/53d9897e/54d844d8/1c899c75/3653356970/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200408_p_1_fl__534__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d503/53d9897e/54d844d8/1c899c74/3653356970/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: David Buskill
subject: Are you registered?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
Voter registration in Indiana ends May 4th... are you registered?
Fellow Hoosier, I just want to remind you that voter registration in Indiana ends at the close of business May 4th. You may have heard that the Indiana primary has been moved to June 2, but the last day to register is still open until May 4th. To ensure you have the opportunity to vote for Dr. Chuck for Congress, you must be registered to vote. If you’re already registered, you can order your absentee ballot by clicking **[HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/48e954448bc11cfc/44bdb68934d3f605c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**. All registered voters in Indiana are eligible to vote Absentee-in-person at the county election board office. The deadline to return your ballot form is May 21st by 11:59 p.m. Can you do me a favor and forward this email to your Hoosier friends who may need reminding that today is the last day to register to vote? We can win this race for Dr. Chuck, and it starts by making sure your voice is heard at the ballot box. Thanks a million, David Buskill
Campaign Manager for Dr. Chuck Dietzen
Republican Candidate for Congress (IN-05) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/48e954448bc11cfc/1895d18d5014763bc3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/48e954448bc11cfc/dfe993836bf796b5c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

subject: Sign on: We need universal vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17044409/181666587/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDIzYTJmMS1mMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12Z7qU8uM7Nk-2J2nmpgVNIPYkXW2Cw3_bsdYaQfzsA=&emci=ef136c62-e379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d023a2f1-f079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Hello friend,

I'm reaching out about an important problem we are now grappling with as a result of this pandemic -- ensuring that every American can still have their voice heard in our elections, and that they can do so safely.

**We need to be clear from the outset: The Republicans' efforts to force in-person voting in Wisconsin yesterday was totally reprehensible. This is much bigger than politics, and we cannot force the American people to choose between their health and participating in our democracy.**

I totally support the efforts of Governor Gavin Newsom to expand vote-by-mail in our state. I'm also proud that Democrats and Republicans in San Diego have led the way to grow vote-by-mail participation in the community. But there's much more we can do and must do as a country:

[**Can you add your name and say that you support nationwide, universal vote-by-mail in our coming elections? Every American should be given the opportunity to vote remotely during this pandemic.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17044410/181666588/1354529082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDIzYTJmMS1mMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12Z7qU8uM7Nk-2J2nmpgVNIPYkXW2Cw3_bsdYaQfzsA=&emci=ef136c62-e379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d023a2f1-f079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) **[Add your name](https://secure.ngpvan.com/hUnD-S8jokq4Y3__CzAzHg2)** As you may know, a handful of states like Oregon and Washington already hold elections entirely with mail-in ballots. Unfortunately, mail-in ballot laws are not as friendly in other parts of the United States. It’s going to require an overwhelming, nationwide push to move this forward, and I need your help to get the ball rolling.

[**Add your name to say that you support universal vote-by-mail in our coming elections >>** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17044411/181666589/1354529082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDIzYTJmMS1mMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12Z7qU8uM7Nk-2J2nmpgVNIPYkXW2Cw3_bsdYaQfzsA=&emci=ef136c62-e379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d023a2f1-f079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)

Thanks for all you do,

_Georgette_
**[Add your name](https://secure.ngpvan.com/hUnD-S8jokq4Y3__CzAzHg2)**

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17044412/181666590/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDIzYTJmMS1mMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12Z7qU8uM7Nk-2J2nmpgVNIPYkXW2Cw3_bsdYaQfzsA=&emci=ef136c62-e379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d023a2f1-f079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. clean_body: | Hello friend, I'm reaching out about an important problem we are now grappling with as a result of this pandemic -- ensuring that every American can still have their voice heard in our elections, and that they can do so safely. We need to be clear from the outset: The Republicans' efforts to force in-person voting in Wisconsin yesterday was totally reprehensible. This is much bigger than politics, and we cannot force the American people to choose between their health and participating in our democracy. I totally support the efforts of Governor Gavin Newsom to expand vote-by-mail in our state. I'm also proud that Democrats and Republicans in San Diego have led the way to grow vote-by-mail participation in the community. But there's much more we can do and must do as a country: As you may know, a handful of states like Oregon and Washington already hold elections entirely with mail-in ballots. Unfortunately, mail-in ballot laws are not as friendly in other parts of the United States. It’s going to require an overwhelming, nationwide push to move this forward, and I need your help to get the ball rolling. Thanks for all you do, Georgette | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Checking In
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
#
Friends,

I would like to begin by wishing all of our Jewish friends a Happy Passover. As we continue down this uncharted path created in response to the risks of the spread of the coronavirus, Heather and I wish you well and hope that you and yours are staying safe and healthy. We also hope you are weathering the financial turmoil and uncertainty that is affecting nearly everyone in the country. It is difficult to ask for help during this time of uncertainty, but we simply must continue to fund our campaign and need your help. It is important to have someone in the Montana State Auditor’s office who has practical experience in both of the highly regulated industries that the Auditor’s office oversees. I have that experience. It is equally important to have someone who has an understanding and a plan for managing our State Trust Lands on the Board of Land Commissioners. We must protect what we hold dear while supporting critical industries such as farming and ranching. Constitutionally, we use our State Trust Lands to generate much-needed funds to support public education. My general plan in office is to streamline regulation. I will focus on regulations that protect Montana consumers while reducing administrative regulations that prevent Montana businesses from thriving. In other words, protect Montanans, but also get the government out of our way so our businesses can excel. Streamlining regulations is the starting point in bringing more insurance companies into Montana. The more competition, the more options Montanans have and the better pricing we can expect. Competition drives prices down and choices up. As recently as two weeks ago, I successfully worked with both Congressman Gianforte and Senator Daines to reduce regulatory restrictions that were preventing small businesses across the country from efficiently responding to the COVID-19 crisis. I will continue to look into ways to protect consumers and make it more attractive for companies to do business in Montana. Please help if you can spare any amount to move us to the finish line. I will fight for lower prices in health insurance and prescription drug prices. I will fight to support our farmers and ranchers, the backbone of our economy on the Land Board. I will fight for better access to our public lands. I will fight to raise much-needed funding for our school system. I will fight to protect all Montanans from those who may mislead or defraud them. I’m here to serve, and Heather and I pray we all move forward quickly past the current turmoil caused by COVID-19. We appreciate any help you can spare to advance our campaign. Stay safe, stay healthy. Take care of yourself, your family, and your community. God Bless You, God Bless Montana, and God Bless America.
---
| | |
---
| Troy Downing
---
---
| | Anything helps. Please Consider Donating $5, $10, $20, or $100 Today.
---

body:
There are less than 7 months until election day in November. So far, the fight that we have put up against the millions of dark money dollars funneling into Maine has been astounding. But in order for Susan to win in November, we MUST do better.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIyMTY3NzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwNjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[important memo for dpwillis67@gmail.com from Susan Collins for Senator campaign staff]
**There are less than 7 months until election day in November.** So far, the fight that we have put up against the millions of dark money dollars funneling into Maine has been astounding. But in order for Susan to win in November, **we MUST do better.**
That is why all of us here at Team Collins are proposing this question to Susan's most loyal supporters: [**Could you contribute once a month until November and become a sustaining donor of Susan 's campaign?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIyMTY3NzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwNjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**-> That is 7 donations -- one a month until November. With your commitment of 7 donations, Susan's campaign will be able to continue the fight against those on the Far Left trying to dictate Maine's election.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIyMTY3NzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwNjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Especially during these turbulent times, our grassroots fundraising is more important than ever before. When we cannot hold in-person events, we rely on our supporters online _that much more_ to help Susan have the resources she needs to win in the fall.
We are asking for you to show your support by contributing 7 times in the next 7 months. [**Click HERE to become a sustaining donor of Susan 's campaign and help put an end to the Far Left influence in Maine!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDIyMTY3NzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwNjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This election is not just about the future of Maine, it is about the future of the country. America cannot afford another Senator who is a rubber-stamp for Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. We need sensible, smart, and hardworking leaders who actually get things done -- _**we need Susan Collins.**_
Thank you for all your support. By becoming a sustaining donor of Susan's campaign, you are giving **the most generous and important contribution a donor can give.** It would truly make an incredible difference in Susan's fight.
Signed,
Team Collins

name: Tina Smith
subject: Cruel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — As millions of Americans lose their jobs during this public health crisis, and families across the nation face financial hardship, the Trump administration refuses to let uninsured Americans sign up for affordable health care. Last week, Trump made clear he wouldn’t allow a federal special enrollment period for coverage under the Affordable Care Act — a detrimental move for too many folks who have lost their health insurance because of the pandemic. This administration is leaving millions of Americans to fend for themselves without the coverage they need to afford a doctor's visit or hospital bill — in the middle of a global health crisis. That’s just cruel. We’ve got to make sure that everyone has access to affordable health care coverage, which is why I’m demanding the Trump administration open a special enrollment period for the ACA during this crisis. **[If you’re with me, add your name to my petition and demand President Trump allow a federal special enrollment period to let uninsured Americans sign up for health insurance during this time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17046330/181690929/263132988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNmODA4Yy1mZDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHUbHauCE0e-ZMHW-X9R9f6NtDsjVFwf3kZ3ubiV0-Y=&emci=1c3f808c-fd79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1d3f808c-fd79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17046331/181690930/263132988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNmODA4Yy1mZDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHUbHauCE0e-ZMHW-X9R9f6NtDsjVFwf3kZ3ubiV0-Y=&emci=1c3f808c-fd79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1d3f808c-fd79-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
No one should ever have to choose between staying healthy or going bankrupt — especially not during a global pandemic. That’s why this administration must allow uninsured Americans to sign up for the affordable health care they need.
Thank you, as always, for taking action. Stay safe.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: Warren Democrats
subject: re: Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
What happened in Wisconsin yesterday was a disgrace -- with hundreds of polling places shut-down, hours-long lines to vote, and people not getting their absentee ballots in time to vote safely from... | | |
---
What happened in Wisconsin yesterday was a disgrace -- with hundreds of polling places shut-down, hours-long lines to vote, and people not getting their absentee ballots in time to vote safely from home.

Let's be clear: Right-wing politicians are taking advantage of the coronavirus crisis to kick their voter suppression efforts into high gear.

But we're fighting back.

**Yesterday, Elizabeth laid out how we'll be organizing and calling on government officials to demand safe voting practices -- but according to our records, you haven't signed up to join this new fight yet.

[Add your name and fight by Elizabeth's side to make our elections safe and secure.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257a6/45c30650/1f49b59f7/66e967f2/2988152198/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwOFBfU0dOX0tJQ19EXzIwMjAwNDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ08P_SGN_KIC_D_20200408_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

And keep reading for more details from Elizabeth.

Thanks,

Warren Democrats

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257a6/45c30650/1f49b59f7/66e967f2/2988152198/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwOFBfU0dOX0tJQ19EXzIwMjAwNDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ08P_SGN_KIC_D_20200408_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Tue, Apr 7, 2020
Subject: Add your name: Make sure every American can vote safely in a pandemic
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
Voting is the foundation of our democracy.

And no one should have to choose between protecting their health and making their voice heard.

But with the coronavirus crisis making it dangerous to gather in public places, wait in long lines, and touch shared surfaces like voting machines, we need a plan to make sure Americans can vote safely in a pandemic.

That's why today, I'm outlining simple steps that Congress needs to take in its next coronavirus relief package to protect the health and safety of America's voters. Here are a few of them:
* Universal vote by mail in every state
* Online and same-day voter registration so that everyone can make their voice heard
* At least 30 days of early voting and extended voting hours to enhance the safety of in-person voting
* Guarantee that every poll worker is compensated -- and receives hazard pay -- for their work
* Provide at least $4 billion for state and local governments to administer elections and to keep poll workers safe

There's more, but it all comes down to this: **During a pandemic, we need voters to stay safe, but not be silenced. And our leaders -- from Congress to governors and state officials -- need to act _now_ to lay the groundwork for safe and secure elections in November.**

**[Over the coming weeks, we'll be calling on governors, local officials, and the federal government to make sure every American can safely exercise their right to vote. Add your name to join the fight and get more updates on how you can take action.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257a6/45c30650/1f49b59f7/66e967f2/2988152198/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwOFBfU0dOX0tJQ19EXzIwMjAwNDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ08P_SGN_KIC_D_20200408_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We've already seen Republicans use the crisis to accelerate an undemocratic power grab and disenfranchise millions.

Last week, Donald Trump claimed that if we made it easier for more people to vote, "you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again."

And he's just the latest in a string of right-wing politicians who've embraced efforts to make it harder for people to vote -- by closing polling places, purging millions of voters from voting rolls, limiting early voting, and passing restrictive voter identification laws.

But in times of crisis, when people's lives and livelihoods are on the line, it's more important than ever that elected representatives are held accountable. There's no room for partisanship when it comes to protecting the basic machinery of our democracy.

We need to make sure every voter can safely make their voice heard, including by taking these steps:
* Expand online voter registration so it's an option in every state, extend voter registration deadlines as much as practicable, and let any eligible voter register on Election Day.

* Make states provide at least 30 days of early voting to help reduce crowds and maintain access to safe, in-person voting.

* Mail every registered voter a ballot and a postage-paid return envelope. That way, they can safely fill it out at home, send it back in, and participate in our democracy.

* Ban states from purging voter rolls during this pandemic -- unless a voter has come forward and said they want to be removed, or unless there's objective evidence that their registration is out of date. And states must add voters' names back to the rolls if they've already been purged.

* Ensure equal access to the polls -- regardless of race or ethnicity, language, tribal citizenship, or ability. That includes ensuring sufficient and safe polling places on Election Day, providing accessible ballot machines for people with disabilities, expanding voting hours, and allowing people to vote with a sworn statement of identity instead of an ID.

* Provide no less than $4 billion in surge funding to states for election administration, compensate every poll worker (including providing hazard pay), and bolster election security.

By taking these steps -- and more -- we'll ensure elections can proceed safely, securely, and on time.

**Congress needs to act, but governors and state officials must do their part, too -- and as a movement, we'll be calling on them to do just that.

I'll keep up the fight in Washington, but I can't do it alone -- we can only protect our democracy if we fight side by side.

[Sign up now to say you're in this fight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257a6/45c30650/1f49b59f7/66e967f2/2988152198/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwOFBfU0dOX0tJQ19EXzIwMjAwNDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ08P_SGN_KIC_D_20200408_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

subject: Investigate the World Health Organization

body:
Since the beginning of this crisis, the World Health Organization (WHO) has been spreading misinformation and lies from the Chinese Communist Party. Back in early January, when the Chinese were fully aware that the virus was spreading rapidly, the World Health Organization sent out this lie.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42217090&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwOTc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Since the beginning of this crisis, the World Health Organization (WHO) has been spreading misinformation and lies from the Chinese Communist Party.

Back in early January, when the Chinese were fully aware that the virus was spreading rapidly, the World Health Organization sent out this lie.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDIyMTcwOTAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwOTc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The Chinese Communist Party was expelling foreign journalists and silencing those inside China that were trying to alert the world of the growing threat.

**It is unacceptable that the World Health Organization was spreading Chinese communist propaganda during the China Virus pandemic. **

**[Sign the petition to investigate the World Health Organization.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIyMTcwOTAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwOTc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

The World Health Organization even attacked President Trump's decision to stop travel from China to slow the spread of the virus.

The United States gives hundreds of millions of dollars a year to the WHO and it is time we investigate why the WHO is spreading Chinese propaganda instead of fighting the pandemic.

[**Sign the petition to investigate the World Health Organization.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIyMTcwOTAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDkwOTc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

|
In service,

Tom Cotton

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s message to America’s big banks
body:
President Trump called on CEOs from America’s largest financial institutions to join him for a conference call yesterday. His message: Keep doing... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7aa3861c1c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s message to America’s big banks**

**President Trump** called on CEOs from America’s largest financial institutions to join him for a conference call yesterday. His message: Keep doing everything you can to support our nation’s small businesses during this pandemic.

**“We’re grateful** for the many ways in which your companies have answered the call to join our national endeavor,” he said. “Thank you for donating tens of millions of dollars.”

**Millions of Americans** are doing their part by staying home to slow the spread of Coronavirus. They deserve all the support they can get. On Friday, President Trump’s Small Business Administration launched the Paycheck Protection Program, which authorizes $350 billion in forgivable loans for companies that keep workers on payroll.

🎬 **Ivanka Trump:** [“We’ll keep fighting for you.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2ed564545&e=3ee4985eea)

**As of yesterday** , the SBA has processed more than $70 billion in guaranteed loans for these qualifying small businesses. More loans are being approved every hour.

**Small business owners** have already told the SBA what this financial relief means for their companies and their workers:
* **“This is a game-changer** for us. Our employees will be so excited to hear they will still be getting paychecks,” a coffee shop [owner in North Carolina](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b51885b109&e=3ee4985eea) says.

* **“Because of this help,** we can get through with a minimal amount of pain and suffering for something that wasn’t [our employees’] fault,” the owner of an A/C and heating installation service in Nebraska said.

* **“This SBA loan came at the perfect time,** because I wouldn’t have been able to make payroll or mortgage,” said an auto repair center owner in Oklahoma.

* **“Now we can give back** to the community in a meaningful way. Our espresso kiosks are giving away [thousands of dollars in free coffee](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fba328fc64&e=3ee4985eea) to frontline workers–first responders, health care workers, and law enforcement,” the owner of a drive-thru espresso business in Montana said.

**America’s 30 million **small businesses together employ more than 60 million people. Their survival is essential to our economy. Given the overwhelming success of the Paycheck Protection Program so far, President Trump is asking Congress for additional support to help these businesses and their workers.

🎬 **President Trump:** [Share your stories with #AmericaWorksTogether](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c5a5e6e61&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

|
---

---

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: [COVID-19] How you can help and important resources
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend,
Cases of coronavirus continue to grow across the country, and Donald Trump continues to avoid responsibility and facts in order to point fingers and play favorites.

**The truth is that low-income communities and communities of color are bearing the brunt of this pandemic.** Coronavirus hits especially hard in areas where economic investment is already below average. Remote-work opportunities are disproportionately lower for people of color, forcing many to brave the front lines to earn a living — or face unemployment. For the families and school children who rely on meal programs, this new reality can mean they are left hungry. And where corporations have been given free reign to contaminate the air and water, there are higher death rates due to coronavirus.

On top of that, the Trump administration continues to ignore these communities while bailing out corporations. **During these difficult times, we must work together to support, inform, and uplift our most under-resourced communities.**

When Tom emailed about what he and Kat are working on and asked for your thoughts, many of you responded with stories about donating food to local organizations and food banks. It’s so critical in this time to think about basic needs like putting food on the table, and Tom and Kat are committed to funding food programs in order to provide meals to those in need. This crisis and its economic impact has meant that children who rely on school lunches, low-income families, unhoused communities, and too many others are going hungry.

One of the ways Tom and Kat are stepping up is with a donation to a food bank nearby, the [_Alameda County Community Food Bank_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZoYhNx1ivq-2FipZXSX1LSB18-3DpafY_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwuQAQogjASkt5UlqWRPaFez4-2FVxWCVKnhKweKr8hjxd4xroZtmpRDg4YDu7LpIxvDb-2BddAN7llcnPzHB-2BAN02m4SLE-2BLhEc7r3nODAPTSOYuBSbhHmW53EL3it7rpViuQJJcL9XLXw2HFAvES7M0wuI8muCa1UH8H-2FCn9VfAHVtzmAj2-2BhBRZaDVRFTfSozQ-2FtheKp1mx70LT-2FvNY6AkreyKasUmqayMMm0I4B-2BGnP6VhY7oixeJ6FiDofANtYsdjPJLB13ZKPS4uwAq7BmyieOMEvolh5jMIiyHcJVAFz5Rbvxih4c0Ksk03DtGVWebIHJsJ35UTXmXZRsbVFWtkcvD6i7irZGWwnHgCzgNt5nW8TCXK9caYX1prQvg5MDh4g2rf1GTFiHeCtz7ulu7rMrE4cUC8HtBlLdPEJPvgq3XeLkvdhIddAWoo5aSK2BT8ui9zuxa-2BXg1KLwIw4juLPDHu0ZXWakQDz5YpAA6QjpcKadQpOfMR33AYnoQzIPSNNKl8NTMl-2FijZwEcE8qtqdz-2B8BM-2F-2F3mw7rjdVoNYywTkBy2RAaevG-2B2BDHVpuaC2svXLNxsB73g7ovaqHsUQnoA7R4KWFSW-2Blvh7PX6S2BqBi8dHCbCPYb71JF3inCsbrucbt0l6hMKWwp5MJ34ZhCNmebF7J0eJuydMYMamBpXJJQ-2BHiugCxJjzaHLH8bRc8). **If you’d like to support your own local food bank** , Feeding America can help you find one nearby that could use your support. clean_body: | | | | Friend, Cases of coronavirus continue to grow across the country, and Donald Trump continues to avoid responsibility and facts in order to point fingers and play favorites. The truth is that low-income communities and communities of color are bearing the brunt of this pandemic. Coronavirus hits especially hard in areas where economic investment is already below average. Remote-work opportunities are disproportionately lower for people of color, forcing many to brave the front lines to earn a living — or face unemployment. For the families and school children who rely on meal programs, this new reality can mean they are left hungry. And where corporations have been given free reign to contaminate the air and water, there are higher death rates due to coronavirus. On top of that, the Trump administration continues to ignore these communities while bailing out corporations. During these difficult times, we must work together to support, inform, and uplift our most under-resourced communities. When Tom emailed about what he and Kat are working on and asked for your thoughts, many of you responded with stories about donating food to local organizations and food banks. It’s so critical in this time to think about basic needs like putting food on the table, and Tom and Kat are committed to funding food programs in order to provide meals to those in need. This crisis and its economic impact has meant that children who rely on school lunches, low-income families, unhoused communities, and too many others are going hungry. One of the ways Tom and Kat are stepping up is with a donation to a food bank nearby, the . If you’d like to support your own local food bank , Feeding America can help you find one nearby that could use your support. We also heard stories about how this team is making face masks at home for friends, family, and community members who need them. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention now recommends that everyone in a public setting where social distancing is difficult (like a grocery store) should wear a face mask, so they are needed now more than ever. This crisis — and our government’s failure to respond quickly and effectively — have presented our country and the world with an unprecedented challenge. We can all do our part to help one another and aid organizations on the front lines. Thank you for your support and doing what you can to help others. Together, Team Tom | | Additional Resources: Visit for guidelines and answers to most questions. If you believe you are exhibiting any symptoms of COVID-19 , Now is the time many of us worry about taxes, but the tax deadline has been extended to July 15, 2020. If you have further questions or need help filing, visit . Providing the IRS with your direct deposit information will help you receive your Economic Impact Payment or “coronavirus stimulus check” sooner, if you’re eligible. If you haven’t filed taxes in 2018 or 2019, make sure to submit your taxes as soon as possible. Unsure what to do about school? Visit for answers on primary, secondary, and college education questions. | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Please visit for information and resources to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and prevent infection. Follow CDC guidelines, including social distancing to avoid large groups and unnecessary contact with others, and adhere to instruction from your local and state elected officials. name: Terry Neese
subject: We are on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, I filed my paperwork today to officially become a candidate for Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District.
We've come a long way since we launched our campaign last year. I want to thank all of our volunteers and supporters who've worked tirelessly to get us this far.
**But the fight is just beginning!** Each and every day, Nancy Pelosi and liberal special interests are pumping money into Kendra Horn's campaign, with over $2 million in donations to date. And you can bet they're going to spend that money distorting Horn's failed, radical record.
**It is critical we have the resources to set the record straight. ** Friend, you have generously supported our campaign in the past. But we HAVE to keep the momentum going.

[Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or $25 today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/4u8heR2h2oCwHdpoF7dBAg/jJIsuON1NQznf2hon763pWBQ)
As long as we make voters aware of who Kendra Horn really is, WE WILL WIN. **By donating even just a few dollars now, you can ensure we will have the resources necessary to remind voters that Kendra Horn voted to impeach President Trump and even held up Coronavirus aid over liberal policy priorities like the "Green New Deal."** [I believe those are facts every voter deserves to know, and if you agree, I hope you'll consider making a small contribution today.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/4u8heR2h2oCwHdpoF7dBAg/jJIsuON1NQznf2hon763pWBQ) **Once again, I 'd like to thank all of you who have made this campaign possible and empowered us to get on the ballot.**
Now, I am ready to take the fight to Kendra. I hope you'll join me.
Terry Neese
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/CGhUuFrp1XVPF9bk8bRT6g/jJIsuON1NQznf2hon763pWBQ) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/i5C892pOUZxGchUv1xhHVZJQ/jJIsuON1NQznf2hon763pWBQ)

\-- Politico

Peter --

Republicans are now spending $1 million just on TV ads to defeat Christy and steal this seat.

We've been asking for your help so that we can fight back, and now we're ready -- we've got a new TV ad featuring Christy. **But to get it on the air and compete with the GOP's big buy, we're going to need your continued support.**

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8b6/29776869/a065695/569f4c1a/1821167242/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDhfYWR3YXJzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_adlaunch?refcode=em20_200408_adwars-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8b6/29776869/a065695/569f4c1b/1821167242/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDhfYWR3YXJzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_adlaunch?refcode=em20_200408_adwars-full")

name: Dem Senate Update
subject: re: Georgia (via National Journal)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
It's official, friend - **_National Journal_ just named Georgia's Senate race one of the TOP 10 _most competitive_ Senate races in the country!**
**Experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to _The Washington Post_ agree: If we lose in Georgia, Democrats have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate.**
That's why Kelly Loeffler (R) - our opponent _who was just accused of potential insider trading - _is flooding this race with $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to try and buy this seat and secure Mitch McConnell's grip on Senate control.
We HAVE to elect Reverend Warnock (D) - a strong leader who's fighting to end GOP corruption and flip Georgia blue so we can take back the Senate for Democrats - but we can't do it without you.

name: Latest News from John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Blood on His Hands...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, they're coming after Trump with everything they've got... * | | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, I trust you are being safe and are doing well in the midst of this pandemic. However, the Democrats are once again becoming "**Unhinged** " regarding COVID-19 and placing any blame they can on President Trump. Stars and Stripes Forever PAC's board member, Chuck Muth, summed it up quite simply in his March 30th newsletter called "Muth's Truths"...
---
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EJr8IUz&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EGUstQl&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EJItJKq&)
---
The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat President Trump. They impeached him... He was acquitted. Now they are trying to blame him for not handling the Coronavirus effectively and hold him responsible for the tragic deaths of our fellow Americans. **We must continue to fight against their lies and hatred to make sure that President Trump is re-elected. Our country's future depends on it!** [Please donate immediately](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMQqFce&) to keep our ads on the air in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota and New Mexico --- all carefully selected for high percentage of minority voters, a battleground state, and/or to defeat a radical socialist who hates America! Peter, if we're going to win in November... WE MUST STAY ON THE AIR AND EXPAND INTO OTHER BATTLEGROUND STATES IMMEDIATELY! [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EB9mJBJ&)"Mini Mike" Bloomberg just donated **$18 Million** to the DNC to help them defeat President Trump and has pledged to spend a total of **$2 BILLION** against him... Frankly, his money would be better spent helping out his state and fellow New Yorkers that have been hit so hard with the virus. But it seems he hates Donald Trump more than he loves his fellow man. Despicable to say the least. And now that Bernie is out, Sleepy Joe will get huge influxes of cold, hard cash! [Please, Peter, donate today to keep us on the air, dispelling the Liberals' Lies and fighting for President Trump.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EwSrSvT&) Stay safe. Stay well. United together as caring Americans, we'll get through this and be all the stronger from what we learned. It's who we are... | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Shr3AM&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFftSV7&)
---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.
| | Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=3WMCC&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQC4B5w&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=3WMCC&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQw6CyT&pt=change_details) at any time.
[ ](https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=ytWvg&u=z93TV&z=ESOdhD7&)
